zombie_texture.prompt: Transform the texture in image 1 into a classic Minecraft-inspired zombie skin. Use a low-resolution blocky aesthetic with chunky pixels and no gradients. Features: greenish decayed skin, dark hollow eyes with tiny white pupils, a tattered teal shirt, and dark blue pants. The output must be a flat, pixelated texture map with visible pixel boundaries and a clean 8-bit style.
zombie_texture.description: A blocky, pixelated Minecraft-style zombie texture map with a green skin tone and tattered clothing.

beach_sand_texture.prompt: Generate a fully tileable sand texture for a beach, designed to repeat seamlessly in both directions. Desaturated sandy brown-grey color, featuring subtle grain, small pebbles, and faint footprint indentations. Dark, threatening atmosphere, overcast lighting, low-poly game style, no visible seams.
beach_sand_texture.description: Seamlessly tileable sand texture for the beach environment, desaturated and moody.

ocean_water_texture.prompt: Generate a fully tileable ocean water texture, designed to repeat seamlessly in both directions. Dark blue-grey, murky and ominous color. Subtle wave patterns and foam, slightly turbulent appearance. Low-poly game aesthetic, flat shading with subtle gradients, dark atmosphere, no visible seams.
ocean_water_texture.description: Seamlessly tileable murky ocean water texture for the background sea.

crosshair_icon.prompt: Generate a simple crosshair icon for an FPS game, minimalist circle-dot with cross design, white color with a sharp thin black outline for high visibility, clean geometric lines, professional UI asset, transparent background.
crosshair_icon.description: A high-contrast aiming reticle for the center of the screen.

reload_icon.prompt: Generate a reload button icon, circular arrow symbol indicating rotation/refresh, clean white silhouette with dark outline, simple and recognizable at small sizes, game UI style, transparent background.
reload_icon.description: A circular reload action icon for mobile UI controls.

ammo_icon.prompt: Generate a simple bullet ammunition icon, vertical orientation, clean and minimal silhouette, white/grey color with a dark outline, professional UI asset, transparent background.
ammo_icon.description: A bullet/ammunition icon for the ammo counter display.

hilltop_ground_texture.prompt: Generate a top-down, fully tileable terrain texture for a hilltop mountain environment, designed to repeat seamlessly in both horizontal and vertical directions. The texture should be a mix of rocky dirt, sparse patches of dying grass, and worn earth. Use a muted color palette of browns, grays, and subtle green hints to create a gritty, war-torn battlefield aesthetic. Professional game-ready texture, no visible seams, even lighting, high detail.
hilltop_ground_texture.description: A seamlessly tileable rocky dirt and sparse grass ground texture for a war-torn hilltop battlefield.

gunfire_sound.prompt: Punchy and powerful single machine gun shot for a gatling gun. Features a deep, metallic impact followed by a subtle mechanical spinning whir. High-fidelity, aggressive, and crisp. Designed for a gritty zombie shooter game to be triggered rapidly in succession. Short decay with a clean tail, no background noise, non-looping one-shot.
gunfire_sound.description: A powerful, punchy machine gun shot with mechanical textures for a zombie shooter.

background_music.prompt: Dark apocalyptic background music for a zombie defense game, industrial horror style. Features a driving, tense electronic beat at 100-110 BPM. Layered with heavy cinematic drums, ominous low-frequency synthesizers, and metallic industrial textures. Aggressive but rhythmic, creating a sense of urgency and impending doom without cluttering the soundscape. Minor key, eerie atmosphere with pulsating basslines. Designed to loop seamlessly for continuous gameplay.
background_music.description: Intense apocalyptic background music for zombie wave defense gameplay.

zombie_attack_sound.prompt: A menacing and aggressive zombie attack sound effect. High-intensity snarling followed by a wet, visceral biting crunch. The sound should have a sharp, punchy attack to signal immediate danger, featuring a guttural low-frequency growl and a high-frequency snap. Designed for a fast-paced zombie shooter, it should be scary, organic, and have a very short, clean decay tail for frequent gameplay use. No background noise.
zombie_attack_sound.description: Short, aggressive zombie growl and bite sound for close-combat lunges.

zombie_groan_sound.prompt: Low-pitched, guttural zombie groaning and raspy moaning sound effect. Includes subtle rhythmic dragging and shuffling footsteps on gravel. Eerie, unsettling, and distorted vocalizations with a wet, gravelly texture. Designed for 3D positional audio with a consistent volume level throughout for seamless looping. No sudden peaks, dark apocalyptic atmosphere.
zombie_groan_sound.description: Continuous eerie groaning and shuffling sound for ambient zombie presence.

wave_victory_sound.prompt: Compose a 3-second, one-shot instrumental victory fanfare for a zombie survival game. The sound should start with a bright brass swell and resolve into a heroic, major-key orchestral hit. It needs to provide a sharp contrast to the dark, apocalyptic atmosphere of the gameplay, feeling rewarding and celebratory. High energy, clean production, no vocals, with a slight shimmer reverb tail to signify a moment of safety.
wave_victory_sound.description: A short, triumphant fanfare jingle used to signal the successful completion of a zombie wave.

radio_supplies_deployed.prompt: Female military radio operator voice, professional and calm tone, speaking 'Supplies have been deployed' in English. High-quality voice acting with realistic military communication effects: subtle radio static, lo-fi frequency filtering, and a soft click at the start and end of the transmission. Clear pronunciation, mid-range pitch, suitable for a tactical zombie shooter environment.
radio_supplies_deployed.description: A professional female military radio transmission announcing the arrival of supplies.

item_use_sound.prompt: Create a short, high-quality item activation sound effect for a survival zombie shooter. The sound should feature a bright, rising electronic beep followed by a sharp, satisfying 'shimmering' whoosh. It must feel punchy, clear, and rewarding, signaling a power-up or health kit usage. Avoid deep bass or explosion-like sounds; focus on a clean, digital-organic hybrid texture that stands out against heavy gunfire and zombie groans. 1.5 seconds total with a quick decay.
item_use_sound.description: A satisfying and punchy item activation sound effect with a digital beep and airy whoosh for a zombie shooter.

heavy_breathing_sound.prompt: Isolated sound effect of intense, fast-paced heavy breathing and gasping from a person under extreme stress. The breathing should sound panicked and strained, as if running for their life. Include subtle mouth noises and sharp inhalations of exertion. Clean audio with no background noise or music. Designed to loop seamlessly for a survival game atmosphere. High tension and urgency.
heavy_breathing_sound.description: Urgent, panicked heavy breathing for a high-stress zombie survival scenario.

game_logo.prompt: Transform the existing game logo in image 1 into a high-impact apocalyptic title. Make the word 'ZOMBIE' massive and dominant (60-70% height) with 'LAST HILL' as a smaller subtitle below (25-30% height). Add 3-4 deep, jagged dark claw scratches across the text. Include realistic green zombie blood splatters and drips. Add 5-7 metallic bullet holes with radiating cracks and torn edges piercing through the letters. Maintain the 3D metallic military style, weathered texture, and dramatic lighting. High-resolution, professional game title design, cinematic atmosphere.
game_logo.description: Enhanced cinematic game logo with hierarchical text, claw marks, zombie blood, and bullet holes.

footstep_sound.prompt: Realistic single footstep sound effect, heavy combat boot landing on dry dirt and loose gravel. Include a sharp crunch of pebbles and a subtle dusty spray sound. Urgent and aggressive impact, high-fidelity, isolated for clean repetition. No background noise, non-cartoonish, gritty textures suitable for a tense apocalyptic survival setting.
footstep_sound.description: Quick, gritty boot footstep on dirt and gravel for a high-intensity zombie survival sprint.

supply_collect_sound.prompt: A satisfying, punchy 'item collected' sound effect for a gritty zombie survival game. The sound features a quick fabric zipper zipping shut, followed by a light metallic clink of canned goods or tools hitting each other inside a bag, and a soft rustle of heavy canvas. It should have a clear, rewarding high-frequency 'shimmer' to provide positive feedback. Sharp attack, clean 1-second decay, medium volume, realistic but slightly stylized for game UI feedback.
supply_collect_sound.description: A satisfying and rewarding supply collection sound effect featuring backpack and metallic elements.

countdown_beep_sound.prompt: A sharp, high-pitched digital military beep sound effect for a tactical UI countdown. Short attack with a clean, punchy frequency, followed by a very slight digital reverb tail. Similar to a modern combat radio signal or a high-tech timer. Clear and distinct, designed to be played in sequence for 3-2-1 countdowns in a zombie survival shooter. Professional, non-distorted, and authoritative.
countdown_beep_sound.description: Short, military-style digital beep for the pre-game countdown timer.

wave_start_sound.prompt: A short, 1.2-second tactical military alert sound effect. Three-tone digital sequence (low-mid-high) with a crisp, punchy electronic texture. Designed for a tactical bunker alert system, providing an urgent but clean warning pulse. High-fidelity, immediate attack with no long tail or trailing siren. Professional, crisp, and commanding attention without being ear-piercing.
wave_start_sound.description: Short, punchy military digital alert sequence for wave transitions.

rhythmic_wave_start_sound.prompt: A short, high-energy tactical beat for a zombie wave transition. Features a syncopated electronic alarm sequence, heavy sub-bass hits, and sharp, aggressive industrial percussion. The rhythm is driving and intense, similar to a military warning signal modified with modern EDM textures. 140 BPM, punchy attack, clean decay, no melody, focused on rhythmic urgency and hype.
rhythmic_wave_start_sound.description: Short, energetic tactical beat and syncopated alarm to signal an incoming zombie wave.

heartbeat_sound.prompt: Authentic human heartbeat sound effect, organic and wet 'lub-dub' two-thump physiological pattern. Loopable at 145 BPM. No drums, no percussion, no synthetic bass. Features internal body resonance, subtle pressure pulses, and realistic anatomical textures. Soft but urgent, high-tension medical/survival atmosphere, seamless loop with no clicks or artifacts.
heartbeat_sound.description: Authentic, high-tempo organic heartbeat loop for critical low-health feedback.

base_intrusion_alarm.prompt: High-intensity military base klaxon alarm, 'Red Alert' style siren with a rhythmic wailing modulation. The sound should be harsh, metallic, and urgent, echoing as if through large industrial hallways. Clear, piercing high-mid frequencies to cut through game combat noise. No music or voices, just the mechanical emergency siren. Suitable for a 10-second looping emergency sequence.
base_intrusion_alarm.description: A loud, urgent military-grade klaxon siren signaling a facility breach or major enemy wave.

headshot_sound.prompt: A deeply satisfying and visceral headshot sound effect for a zombie shooter. Features a crisp, punchy metallic bullet impact ping followed immediately by a wet, squelchy 'splat' and a subtle bone-crunching texture. Short and snappy with a high-frequency peak for instant player gratification. Clean, powerful, and organic, designed as a rewarding one-shot feedback cue. No background noise, sharp attack, and rapid decay.
headshot_sound.description: A visceral and rewarding headshot sound effect with a mix of organic splatter and metallic impact.

airstrike_explosion_sound.prompt: Massive tactical airstrike explosion sound effect. Starts with a sharp, punchy detonation and immediate high-pressure shockwave. Followed by a deep, earth-shaking low-frequency rumble and the sound of falling debris and grit. Combat-focused, visceral, and intense. Military style, high-fidelity, no tailing reverb beyond 2 seconds. Clear impact feedback for a zombie defense game.
airstrike_explosion_sound.description: A powerful, visceral military-grade airstrike explosion with deep bass and debris crackle.

rummage_sound.prompt: A continuous, frantic rummaging sound effect for a survival game. Sounds of hands searching through a supply crate and a tactical backpack. Features heavy rustling of nylon fabric, the clinking of small metallic gear, and the shifting of plastic containers. Gritty and realistic textures, medium-close perspective, consistent energy for seamless looping during a search action. No background noise, clean foley recording.
rummage_sound.description: Continuous sound of searching through a supply crate or tactical bag, featuring rustling fabric and moving equipment.

heavy_machinegun_fire.prompt: A single, powerful gunshot sound from a heavy .50 caliber machine gun. Features a deep, thumping bass kick and a sharp mechanical metallic bolt click. Realistic weapon impact with a crisp, punchy attack and a natural, short outdoor tail reverb. No looping, no rapid fire, just one isolated high-caliber blast suitable for a first-person shooter.
heavy_machinegun_fire.description: A single, powerful .50 caliber machine gun shot with deep bass and mechanical punch.

bat_wing_flap_sound.prompt: Continuous rhythmic wing flapping sound effect. Rapid, soft leathery flutter with a subtle airy whoosh. Realistic but slightly eerie and dark texture to fit an apocalyptic zombie game atmosphere. Low-intensity and non-intrusive so multiple instances can overlap. Seamlessly loopable, no harsh transients, clean decay.
bat_wing_flap_sound.description: A continuous, rhythmic leathery wing fluttering sound for bats in a zombie-themed environment.

bat_screech_sound.prompt: A sharp, high-pitched aggressive bat screech for a horror zombie shooter. The sound features a piercing, menacing animalistic shriek with a gritty, undead texture. Quick attack and rapid decay, conveying a sudden lunge. High-frequency intensity, visceral and startling, suitable for a fast-moving flying enemy attack.
bat_screech_sound.description: Short, aggressive bat screech for a zombie bat attack

helmet_hit_sound.prompt: Sharp metallic ricochet sound effect, bullet hitting a thick steel helmet. High-pitched 'ping' and 'clang' with a brief resonant shimmer. Punchy, clean attack with a very short decay, military shooter style, satisfying feedback for armored headshots. No background noise, high-impact and realistic.
helmet_hit_sound.description: A sharp metallic ricochet sound for bullets hitting armored zombie helmets.

headshot_voice_1.prompt: A deep, gruff male action hero voice shouting 'HEADSHOT!' with extreme satisfaction and aggression. The delivery should be punchy, energetic, and powerful, sounding like a seasoned military veteran. Clean studio recording, no background noise, dry vocal with a slight natural grit, suitable for a high-intensity zombie shooter announcer voice.
headshot_voice_1.description: An aggressive, satisfied 'HEADSHOT!' voice line from a tough military character for combat feedback.

headshot_voice_2.prompt: A single, isolated voice line of a tough, gritty male soldier yelling 'BOOM! Got 'em!' with intense aggression and satisfaction. High energy, deep raspy tone, clear articulation. The performance should sound like a hardened action hero celebrating a successful sniper kill. Dry recording, no background noise, short and punchy exclamation, 1.5 seconds maximum duration.
headshot_voice_2.description: Satisfied masculine battle cry 'BOOM! Got 'em!' for high-impact headshot kills.

headshot_voice_3.prompt: A gruff, masculine military voice shouting 'That's what I'm talking about!' with intense adrenaline and battle-hardened excitement. The tone is triumphant and gritty, like an action hero in a zombie apocalypse. Clear vocal projection, slightly raspy, short and punchy delivery. High-quality studio recording, no background noise, dry signal.
headshot_voice_3.description: An adrenaline-pumped male soldier voice exclamation for rewarding headshot kills.

headshot_voice_4.prompt: A deep, gruff male soldier voice. The sound starts with a short, satisfied guttural grunt followed by a quick, aggressive 'Perfect!' shouted with confidence. The tone is tough, professional, and slightly arrogant, fitting a grizzled action hero. High clarity, punchy delivery, dry studio quality with minimal reverb, suitable for an intense zombie shooter combat feedback loop.
headshot_voice_4.description: A confident, deep male voice grunt and exclamation used to reward the player for a precision headshot.

headshot_voice_5.prompt: A deep, masculine, battle-hardened veteran soldier voice shouting 'Right between the eyes!' with dark satisfaction. The tone is intense, gritty, and visceral, capturing the relief and aggression of a survivor in a zombie apocalypse. High-quality vocal recording, dry with minimal room reverb, professional voice acting, 110-120 BPM delivery pace, aggressive and punchy.
headshot_voice_5.description: A battle-hardened veteran voice shouting 'Right between the eyes!' for a successful kill shot.

bone_throw_sound.prompt: A visceral, short sound effect of a bone being hurled. Starts with a sharp, wet organic crack and snap, immediately followed by a fast, airy 'whoosh' of a projectile cutting through the air. The tone is dark, gruesome, and gritty, matching a zombie horror aesthetic. High-frequency snap with a mid-range aerodynamic whistle. Clean one-shot, no background noise.
bone_throw_sound.description: Short, gruesome sound of a bone being snapped and thrown as a projectile.

screamer_attack_sound.prompt: A horrifying zombie screamer sonic attack. An ear-piercing, high-pitched distorted shriek that pulses with supernatural energy. The sound features a warbling, otherworldly modulation and a digital grit that feels like it's damaging the listener's ears. Sharp, aggressive, and ghostly, designed for a horror zombie game. No background music, clean high-frequency texture, 1.5 seconds long.
screamer_attack_sound.description: A horrifying, supernatural sonic shriek used by a zombie screamer to damage the player.

plane_flyover_sound.prompt: Military cargo plane flyover sound effect, like a C-130 Hercules. Starts with a distant low-frequency hum, builds into a powerful, deep turboprop engine roar with vibrating mechanical textures as it passes directly overhead, and smoothly fades into a distant drone. Realistic, high-fidelity, tense military atmosphere, suitable for a zombie survival airdrop sequence.
plane_flyover_sound.description: Realistic military cargo plane flyover with a deep engine roar for airdrop events.

game_code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>Zombie Beach Assault</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --transition-fast: 150ms;
            --transition-normal: 300ms;
            --space-xs: 8px;
            --space-sm: 16px;
            --space-md: 24px;
            --space-lg: 32px;
            --ease-out: cubic-bezier(0.0, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }

        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Roboto:wght@400;700&display=swap');

        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body, html {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            touch-action: none;
            -ms-touch-action: none;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            background: #1a1a2e;
        }

        #game-world {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        #game-canvas {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }

        /* UI Overlay */
        .ui-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .ui-overlay > * {
            pointer-events: auto;
        }

        /* Crosshair */
        #crosshair {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        #crosshair .crosshair-inner {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }

        /* Modern tactical crosshair */
        .crosshair-line {
            position: absolute;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
            box-shadow: 0 0 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.8), 0 0 6px rgba(255,50,50,0.3);
        }

        .crosshair-line.top {
            width: 3px;
            height: 14px;
            top: 6px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
        }

        .crosshair-line.bottom {
            width: 3px;
            height: 14px;
            bottom: 6px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
        }

        .crosshair-line.left {
            width: 14px;
            height: 3px;
            left: 6px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
        }

        .crosshair-line.right {
            width: 14px;
            height: 3px;
            right: 6px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
        }

        .crosshair-dot {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 4px;
            height: 4px;
            background: #ff3333;
            border-radius: 50%;
            box-shadow: 0 0 4px #ff3333, 0 0 8px rgba(255,50,50,0.5);
        }

        .crosshair-corner {
            position: absolute;
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
        }

        .crosshair-corner.tl {
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            border-right: none;
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        .crosshair-corner.tr {
            top: 0;
            right: 0;
            border-left: none;
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        .crosshair-corner.bl {
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            border-right: none;
            border-top: none;
        }

        .crosshair-corner.br {
            bottom: 0;
            right: 0;
            border-left: none;
            border-top: none;
        }

        /* HUD Elements */
        #score-display {
            position: absolute;
            top: var(--space-sm);
            right: var(--space-sm);
            font-size: 32px;
            color: #fff;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(231,76,60,0.8), 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
            font-weight: 700;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.3) 100%);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
            backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
        }
        
        #rank-display {
            position: absolute;
            top: 76px;
            right: var(--space-sm);
            font-size: 18px;
            color: #ffd700;
            text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,215,0,0.5), 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
            font-weight: 700;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.3) 100%);
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            border: 2px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.3);
            backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            display: block;
            z-index: 50;
            pointer-events: auto;
        }
        
        #rank-display:hover {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,215,0,0.2) 0%, rgba(255,215,0,0.1) 100%);
            border-color: rgba(255,215,0,0.5);
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }
        
        /* Leaderboard Popup */
        #leaderboard-popup {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 90%;
            max-width: 500px;
            max-height: 80%;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.95) 0%, rgba(20,20,40,0.95) 100%);
            border: 3px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.5);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 25px;
            z-index: 100;
            display: none;
            flex-direction: column;
            box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.9), 0 0 30px rgba(255,215,0,0.2);
            overflow-y: auto;
        }
        
        #leaderboard-popup.show {
            display: flex;
        }
        
        #leaderboard-popup .popup-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        #leaderboard-popup .popup-title {
            font-size: 32px;
            color: #ffd700;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            text-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(255,215,0,0.6);
        }
        
        #leaderboard-popup .popup-close {
            font-size: 28px;
            color: #fff;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 5px 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }
        
        #leaderboard-popup .popup-close:hover {
            background: rgba(255,0,0,0.3);
        }
        
        #leaderboard-popup-list {
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }

        #wave-display {
            position: absolute;
            top: var(--space-sm);
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-size: 28px;
            color: #ffeb3b;
            text-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(255,235,59,0.6), 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
            font-weight: 700;
            text-align: center;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.7) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.4) 100%);
            padding: 8px 24px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 2px solid rgba(255,235,59,0.4);
            backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
            min-width: 180px;
        }

        #enemies-display {
            position: absolute;
            top: var(--space-sm);
            left: var(--space-sm);
            font-size: 32px;
            color: #ff6b6b;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255,107,107,0.5), 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
            font-weight: 700;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.3) 100%);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
            backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
        }

        #ammo-display {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Health Bar */
        #health-container {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 40px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 320px;
            height: 32px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.8) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.5) 100%);
            border: 3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
            border-radius: 16px;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.7), inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
        }

        #health-bar {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #66bb6a 0%, #43a047 50%, #2e7d32 100%);
            transition: width 0.3s ease-out;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(76,175,80,0.5);
        }

        #health-bar.danger {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f44336 0%, #c62828 100%);
            animation: healthPulse 0.5s infinite;
        }

        #health-text {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #fff;
            text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.8), 1px 1px 2px #000;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        #health-label {
            position: absolute;
            top: -24px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-size: 14px;
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
            font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
            text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px #000;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        @keyframes healthPulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: 0.7; }
        }

        /* Wave Countdown */
        #wave-countdown {
            position: absolute;
            top: 120px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-size: 32px;
            color: #ffeb3b;
            text-shadow: 3px 3px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
            font-weight: 700;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 15;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            text-align: center;
        }

        #wave-countdown.active {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* Machine Gun Turret - Now rendered in 3D canvas */
        #turret-container {
            display: none;
        }

        /* 3D Muzzle Flash - rendered in canvas now */
        #muzzle-flash-3d {
            display: none;
        }

        /* Shell Casings */
        .shell-casing {
            position: absolute;
            width: 32px;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #d4a84b 0%, #f5d67a 50%, #d4a84b 100%);
            border-radius: 2px;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 6;
        }

        /* Reload Animation */
        #reload-animation {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 100px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-size: 28px;
            color: #ffeb3b;
            text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        #reload-animation.active {
            animation: reloadAnim 1.5s ease-out;
        }

        @keyframes reloadAnim {
            0% { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
            50% { opacity: 1; }
            100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-30px); }
        }

        /* Virtual Joystick */
        #joystick-zone {
            position: absolute;
            right: 0;
            top: 0;
            width: 50%;
            height: 100%;
            display: none;
        }

        /* Shoot Zone (Mobile) */
        #shoot-zone {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            width: 50%;
            height: 100%;
            display: none;
        }

        /* Screens */
        .game-screen {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            padding-bottom: 320px;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.75);
            z-index: 20;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            transition: opacity var(--transition-normal) var(--ease-out);
        }

        .game-screen.active {
            opacity: 1;
            pointer-events: auto;
        }

        /* Loading Screen */
        #loading-screen {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #0a0a15 100%);
            z-index: 100;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease-out;
        }

        #loading-screen.hidden {
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .loading-ui {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 120px;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .loading-bar-container {
            width: 280px;
            height: 24px;
            background: #111;
            border-radius: 4px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 2px solid #444;
            box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.9), inset 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
            position: relative;
        }

        .loading-bar-container::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
            background: repeating-linear-gradient(
                -45deg,
                rgba(0,0,0,0.2),
                rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 10px,
                transparent 10px,
                transparent 20px
            );
            z-index: 2;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .loading-bar {
            height: 100%;
            width: 0%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8a0303, #ff1a1a);
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255,0,0,0.5);
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            transition: width 0.3s ease-out;
        }

        .loading-text {
            margin-top: 16px;
            font-size: 20px;
            color: #ff3333;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.9), 0 0 10px rgba(255,0,0,0.4);
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        .screen-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            position: absolute;
            top: 15%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 100%;
        }

        .screen-title {
            font-size: 104px;
            color: #fff;
            text-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.9), 0 0 40px rgba(231,76,60,0.3);
            margin-bottom: var(--space-md);
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 1.1;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
        }

        .screen-subtitle {
            font-size: 28px;
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
            text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            margin-bottom: var(--space-lg);
            text-align: center;
            font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 1.4;
        }

        .game-btn {
            padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-xl);
            font-size: 36px;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #fff;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #e74c3c 0%, #c0392b 100%);
            border: none;
            border-radius: 12px;
            cursor: pointer;
            min-width: 280px;
            min-height: 96px;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
        }

        .game-btn.pulse-animation {
            animation: btnPulse 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes btnPulse {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.08); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(231,76,60,0.6), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2), 0 0 30px rgba(231,76,60,0.4); }
        }

        .game-btn:active {
            transform: scale(0.96);
            box-shadow: 0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
        }

        .game-btn:focus-visible {
            outline: 3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
            outline-offset: 3px;
        }

        /* Wave Announcement */
        #wave-announcement {
            position: absolute;
            top: 40%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            font-size: 60px;
            color: #fff;
            text-shadow: 4px 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 15;
            text-align: center;
        }

        #wave-announcement.show {
            animation: waveAnnounce 2s ease-out;
        }

        @keyframes waveAnnounce {
            0% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.5); }
            20% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1); }
            30% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); }
            80% { opacity: 1; }
            100% { opacity: 0; }
        }

        /* Wave Complete Banner */
        #wave-complete-banner {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 90%;
            max-width: 500px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.75) 0%, rgba(20,20,30,0.75) 100%);
            border: 3px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.6);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 30px 25px;
            z-index: 18;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(255,215,0,0.3), inset 0 0 30px rgba(255,215,0,0.1);
        }

        #wave-complete-banner.show {
            opacity: 1;
            animation: bannerSlideIn 0.5s ease-out forwards;
        }

        #wave-complete-banner.hide {
            animation: bannerSlideOut 0.5s ease-in forwards;
        }

        @keyframes bannerSlideIn {
            0% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%, 100vh); }
            100% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); }
        }

        @keyframes bannerSlideOut {
            0% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); }
            100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%, 100vh); }
        }

        .wave-complete-title {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #ffd700;
            text-align: center;
            text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,215,0,0.8), 3px 3px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
        }

        .wave-complete-subtitle {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            color: #fff;
            text-align: center;
            text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .wave-stats-container {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .wave-stat-row {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 10px 15px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.1) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 100%);
            border-radius: 10px;
            border-left: 4px solid #4CAF50;
        }

        .wave-stat-row.kills { border-left-color: #f44336; }
        .wave-stat-row.headshots { border-left-color: #ff9800; }
        .wave-stat-row.score { border-left-color: #2196F3; }
        .wave-stat-row.bonus { border-left-color: #9c27b0; }

        .wave-stat-label {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .wave-stat-label .stat-icon {
            font-size: 24px;
        }

        .wave-stat-value {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #fff;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
        }

        .wave-stat-value.bonus-value {
            color: #ffd700;
            text-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(255,215,0,0.5);
        }

        .wave-complete-divider {
            height: 2px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,215,0,0.5), transparent);
            margin: 15px 0;
        }

        .wave-total-score {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 15px 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,215,0,0.2) 0%, rgba(255,215,0,0.1) 100%);
            border-radius: 12px;
            border: 2px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.4);
        }

        .wave-total-label {
            font-size: 22px;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            color: #ffd700;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255,215,0,0.5);
        }

        .wave-total-value {
            font-size: 32px;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #ffd700;
            text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,215,0,0.6);
        }

        .wave-complete-message {
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
            margin-top: 15px;
            animation: messagePulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        
        /* Wave Kill Breakdown */
        .wave-kills-breakdown {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 8px;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-top: 15px;
            padding-top: 15px;
            border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
        }
        
        .wave-kills-breakdown .kill-type {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 10px 18px;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
            border-radius: 10px;
            font-size: 27px;
            font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
        }
        
        .wave-kills-breakdown .kill-type .type-icon {
            font-size: 24px;
        }
        
        .wave-kills-breakdown .kill-type .zombie-icon {
            transform: scale(2);
            margin: 12px;
        }
        
        /* Zombie model CSS icons */
        .zombie-icon {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            display: inline-block;
            position: relative;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        
        /* Larger zombie models for bestiary */
        .zombie-model-full {
            width: 60px;
            height: 100px;
            display: inline-block;
            position: relative;
        }
        
        .zombie-model-full.locked {
            filter: brightness(0) saturate(100%);
            opacity: 0.5;
        }
        
        /* Normal zombie full model */
        .zombie-model-normal {
            background: transparent;
        }
        .zombie-model-normal::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5a8a4a 0%, #4a7a3a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #3a6a2a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-model-normal::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 28px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 20px;
            height: 35px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #3a8a8a 0%, #2a7a7a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #2a6a6a;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }
        .zombie-model-normal .zombie-legs {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 20px;
            height: 30px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2a2a5a 0%, #2a2a5a 45%, transparent 45%, transparent 55%, #2a2a5a 55%, #2a2a5a 100%);
        }
        .zombie-model-normal .zombie-arms {
            position: absolute;
            top: 30px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 50px;
            height: 8px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #5a8a4a 0%, #5a8a4a 20%, transparent 20%, transparent 80%, #5a8a4a 80%, #5a8a4a 100%);
        }
        
        /* Crawler zombie full model */
        .zombie-model-crawler {
            background: transparent;
            height: 50px;
        }
        .zombie-model-crawler::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 10px;
            left: 5px;
            width: 18px;
            height: 18px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5a8a4a 0%, #4a7a3a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #3a6a2a;
            border-radius: 3px;
            transform: rotate(-15deg);
        }
        .zombie-model-crawler::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 15px;
            left: 25px;
            width: 30px;
            height: 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #3a8a8a 0%, #2a7a7a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #2a6a6a;
            border-radius: 2px;
            transform: rotate(-5deg);
        }
        
        /* Helmet zombie full model */
        .zombie-model-helmet {
            background: transparent;
        }
        .zombie-model-helmet::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5a8a4a 0%, #4a7a3a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #3a6a2a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-model-helmet::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -4px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 28px;
            height: 14px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #4a4a4a 0%, #3a3a3a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #2a2a2a;
            border-radius: 5px 5px 0 0;
        }
        .zombie-model-helmet .zombie-body {
            position: absolute;
            top: 28px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 20px;
            height: 35px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #3a8a8a 0%, #2a7a7a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #2a6a6a;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }
        .zombie-model-helmet .zombie-legs {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 20px;
            height: 30px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2a2a5a 0%, #2a2a5a 45%, transparent 45%, transparent 55%, #2a2a5a 55%, #2a2a5a 100%);
        }
        
        /* Runner zombie full model */
        .zombie-model-runner {
            background: transparent;
        }
        .zombie-model-runner::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 22px;
            height: 22px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #8a4a3a 0%, #6a3a2a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #5a2a1a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-model-runner::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 26px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 16px;
            height: 32px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #553333 0%, #442222 100%);
            border: 2px solid #331111;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }
        .zombie-model-runner .zombie-legs {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 18px;
            height: 35px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2a2a4a 0%, #2a2a4a 40%, transparent 40%, transparent 60%, #2a2a4a 60%, #2a2a4a 100%);
        }
        
        /* Giant zombie full model */
        .zombie-model-giant {
            background: transparent;
            width: 80px;
            height: 110px;
        }
        .zombie-model-giant::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 5px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 20px;
            height: 18px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #4a4a5a 0%, #3a3a4a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #2a2a3a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-model-giant::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 25px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 40px;
            height: 50px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #3a3a4a 0%, #2a2a3a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #1a1a2a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-model-giant .zombie-legs {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 35px;
            height: 30px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2a2a3a 0%, #2a2a3a 42%, transparent 42%, transparent 58%, #2a2a3a 58%, #2a2a3a 100%);
        }
        
        /* Bat full model */
        .zombie-model-bat {
            background: transparent;
            width: 70px;
            height: 50px;
        }
        .zombie-model-bat::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 15px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 20px;
            height: 16px;
            background: #2a1a2a;
            border: 2px solid #1a0a1a;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .zombie-model-bat::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 10px;
            left: 5px;
            width: 22px;
            height: 25px;
            background: #1a0a1a;
            border-radius: 50% 0 0 50%;
            box-shadow: 36px 0 0 #1a0a1a;
        }
        
        /* Bone Thrower full model */
        .zombie-model-boneThrower {
            background: transparent;
        }
        .zombie-model-boneThrower::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #7a9a7a 0%, #6a8a6a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #5a7a5a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-model-boneThrower::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 28px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 20px;
            height: 35px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5a5a4a 0%, #4a4a3a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #3a3a2a;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }
        .zombie-model-boneThrower .zombie-ribs {
            position: absolute;
            top: 32px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 14px;
            height: 20px;
            background: repeating-linear-gradient(180deg, #d0d0c0 0px, #d0d0c0 3px, transparent 3px, transparent 6px);
        }
        .zombie-model-boneThrower .zombie-legs {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 20px;
            height: 30px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3a3a4a 0%, #3a3a4a 45%, transparent 45%, transparent 55%, #3a3a4a 55%, #3a3a4a 100%);
        }
        
        /* Screamer full model */
        .zombie-model-screamer {
            background: transparent;
        }
        .zombie-model-screamer::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #8a7a9a 0%, #7a6a8a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #6a5a7a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-model-screamer::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 28px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 22px;
            height: 38px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #4a3a5a 0%, #3a2a4a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #2a1a3a;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }
        .zombie-model-screamer .zombie-mouth {
            position: absolute;
            top: 12px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 12px;
            height: 8px;
            background: #aa66dd;
            border-radius: 2px;
            box-shadow: 0 0 8px #aa66dd;
        }
        .zombie-model-screamer .zombie-legs {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 20px;
            height: 30px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3a2a4a 0%, #3a2a4a 45%, transparent 45%, transparent 55%, #3a2a4a 55%, #3a2a4a 100%);
        }
        
        /* Zombie Dog full model */
        .zombie-model-dog {
            background: transparent;
            width: 80px;
            height: 50px;
        }
        .zombie-model-dog::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 15px;
            left: 15px;
            width: 14px;
            height: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5a4a3a 0%, #4a3a2a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #3a2a1a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-model-dog::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 18px;
            left: 30px;
            width: 35px;
            height: 18px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5a4a3a 0%, #4a3a2a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #3a2a1a;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        .zombie-model-dog .dog-legs {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 5px;
            left: 32px;
            width: 30px;
            height: 15px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4a3a2a 0%, #4a3a2a 20%, transparent 20%, transparent 35%, #4a3a2a 35%, #4a3a2a 55%, transparent 55%, transparent 70%, #4a3a2a 70%, #4a3a2a 90%, transparent 90%);
        }
        .zombie-model-dog .dog-tail {
            position: absolute;
            top: 18px;
            right: 8px;
            width: 12px;
            height: 6px;
            background: #4a3a2a;
            border-radius: 3px;
            transform: rotate(-20deg);
        }
        
        .zombie-icon-normal {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5a8a4a 0%, #4a7a3a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #3a6a2a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-icon-normal::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 6px;
            left: 4px;
            width: 4px;
            height: 4px;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            box-shadow: 10px 0 0 #1a1a1a;
        }
        
        .zombie-icon-crawler {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5a8a4a 0%, #4a7a3a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #3a6a2a;
            border-radius: 3px;
            transform: rotate(-30deg) scaleY(0.6);
        }
        .zombie-icon-crawler::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 5px;
            left: 4px;
            width: 3px;
            height: 3px;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            box-shadow: 8px 0 0 #1a1a1a;
        }
        
        .zombie-icon-helmet {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5a8a4a 0%, #4a7a3a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #3a6a2a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-icon-helmet::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 6px;
            left: 4px;
            width: 4px;
            height: 4px;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            box-shadow: 10px 0 0 #1a1a1a;
        }
        .zombie-icon-helmet::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -2px;
            left: 2px;
            width: 16px;
            height: 8px;
            background: #3a3a3a;
            border-radius: 3px 3px 0 0;
            border: 1px solid #2a2a2a;
        }
        
        .zombie-icon-runner {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #8a4a3a 0%, #6a3a2a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #5a2a1a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-icon-runner::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 6px;
            left: 4px;
            width: 4px;
            height: 4px;
            background: #ff2200;
            box-shadow: 10px 0 0 #ff2200;
        }
        
        .zombie-icon-giant {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #4a4a5a 0%, #3a3a4a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #2a2a3a;
            border-radius: 3px;
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
        }
        .zombie-icon-giant::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 8px;
            left: 5px;
            width: 4px;
            height: 4px;
            background: #ffaa00;
            box-shadow: 12px 0 0 #ffaa00;
        }
        
        .zombie-icon-bat {
            background: #2a1a2a;
            border: 2px solid #1a0a1a;
            border-radius: 50%;
            width: 20px;
            height: 16px;
        }
        .zombie-icon-bat::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 4px;
            left: 3px;
            width: 3px;
            height: 3px;
            background: #ff0000;
            box-shadow: 8px 0 0 #ff0000;
        }
        .zombie-icon-bat::after {
            top: 2px;
            left: -8px;
            width: 10px;
            height: 8px;
            background: #1a0a1a;
            border-radius: 50% 0 0 50%;
            box-shadow: 22px 0 0 #1a0a1a;
        }
        
        .zombie-icon-boneThrower {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #7a9a7a 0%, #6a8a6a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #5a7a5a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-icon-boneThrower::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 5px;
            left: 3px;
            width: 5px;
            height: 5px;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            box-shadow: 10px 0 0 #1a1a1a;
        }
        .zombie-icon-boneThrower::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 2px;
            left: 6px;
            width: 8px;
            height: 3px;
            background: #d0d0c0;
            border-radius: 1px;
        }
        
        .zombie-icon-screamer {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #8a7a9a 0%, #7a6a8a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #6a5a7a;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .zombie-icon-screamer::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 4px;
            left: 3px;
            width: 5px;
            height: 5px;
            background: #fff;
            box-shadow: 10px 0 0 #fff;
        }
        .zombie-icon-screamer::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 2px;
            left: 5px;
            width: 10px;
            height: 6px;
            background: #aa66dd;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }
        
        .zombie-icon-dog {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5a4a3a 0%, #4a3a2a 100%);
            border: 2px solid #3a2a1a;
            border-radius: 3px;
            width: 26px;
            height: 18px;
        }
        .zombie-icon-dog::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 2px;
            left: 2px;
            width: 6px;
            height: 6px;
            background: #6a5a4a;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }
        .zombie-icon-dog::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 3px;
            left: 4px;
            width: 3px;
            height: 3px;
            background: #ff2200;
            box-shadow: 4px 0 0 #ff2200;
        }
        
        .wave-kills-breakdown .kill-type .type-count {
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ff6b6b;
        }
        
        .wave-kills-breakdown-title {
            width: 100%;
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
        }

        @keyframes messagePulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
            50% { opacity: 1; }
        }

        /* Damage Flash */
        #damage-flash {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 0%, rgba(255,0,0,0.5) 100%);
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 12;
        }

        #damage-flash.active {
            animation: damageFlash 0.3s ease-out;
        }

        @keyframes damageFlash {
            0% { opacity: 1; }
            100% { opacity: 0; }
        }

        /* Hit Marker */
        #hit-marker {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 30px;
            height: 30px;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 11;
        }

        #hit-marker::before,
        #hit-marker::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            background: #fff;
        }

        #hit-marker::before {
            width: 100%;
            height: 4px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(45deg);
        }

        #hit-marker::after {
            width: 100%;
            height: 4px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(-45deg);
        }

        #hit-marker.show {
            animation: hitMarkerAnim 0.15s ease-out;
        }

        #hit-marker.headshot {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
        }

        #hit-marker.headshot::before,
        #hit-marker.headshot::after {
            background: #ff0;
            height: 6px;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px #ff0, 0 0 40px #ff0;
        }

        #hit-marker.show.headshot {
            animation: hitMarkerHeadshotAnim 0.35s ease-out;
        }

        @keyframes hitMarkerAnim {
            0% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.5); }
            100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); }
        }

        @keyframes hitMarkerHeadshotAnim {
            0% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(2.5); }
            30% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2); }
            100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); }
        }

        /* Headshot Floating Text */
        .headshot-text {
            position: absolute;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #ffd700;
            text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,215,0,0.9), 0 0 16px rgba(255,150,0,0.6), 2px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.95);
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 25;
            white-space: nowrap;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            animation: headshotTextAnim 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) forwards;
        }

        .headshot-text .bonus {
            display: block;
            font-size: 22px;
            color: #fff;
            text-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(255,255,255,0.7), 2px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
            margin-top: 2px;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }

        @keyframes headshotTextAnim {
            0% { 
                opacity: 0; 
                transform: translate(-50%, 10px) scale(0.6);
                filter: blur(4px);
            }
            12% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translate(-50%, -5px) scale(1.15);
                filter: blur(0);
            }
            25% {
                transform: translate(-50%, -15px) scale(1);
            }
            70% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translate(-50%, -40px) scale(1);
            }
            100% { 
                opacity: 0; 
                transform: translate(-50%, -60px) scale(0.9);
            }
        }

        /* Bullet Time Overlay */
        #bullet-time-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 13;
            opacity: 0;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 40%, rgba(255,255,0,0.15) 100%);
            transition: opacity 0.05s ease-out;
        }

        #bullet-time-overlay.active {
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* Headshot Combo Counter */
        #headshot-combo {
            position: absolute;
            top: 180px;
            right: var(--space-sm);
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #ff0;
            text-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(255,255,0,0.8), 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 15;
            text-align: right;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        #headshot-combo.active {
            opacity: 1;
            animation: comboPulse 0.3s ease-out;
        }

        @keyframes comboPulse {
            0% { transform: scale(1.5); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.1); }
            100% { transform: scale(1); }
        }

        /* Instructions */
        #instructions {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 140px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-size: 22px;
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
            text-align: center;
            pointer-events: none;
            font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
            max-width: 90%;
            line-height: 1.4;
            text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
        }

        /* Airdrop Collection Button */
        #collect-btn {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 200px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            padding: 20px 40px;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #fff;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #27ae60 0%, #1e8449 100%);
            border: 3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
            border-radius: 15px;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: none;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 30px rgba(39,174,96,0.4);
            animation: collectPulse 1.5s infinite;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            z-index: 15;
        }

        @keyframes collectPulse {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 30px rgba(39,174,96,0.4); }
            50% { transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 50px rgba(39,174,96,0.6); }
        }

        #collect-btn .collect-key {
            display: none;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ffeb3b;
            margin-right: 8px;
        }

        /* Show key hint on non-touch devices */
        @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) {
            #collect-btn .collect-key {
                display: inline;
            }
        }

        #collect-btn:active {
            transform: translateX(-50%) scale(0.95);
        }

        /* Collection Progress */
        #collect-progress {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 150px;
            height: 150px;
            display: none;
            z-index: 16;
        }

        #collect-progress svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            transform: rotate(-90deg);
        }

        #collect-progress .progress-bg {
            fill: none;
            stroke: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
            stroke-width: 8;
        }

        #collect-progress .progress-bar {
            fill: none;
            stroke: #27ae60;
            stroke-width: 8;
            stroke-linecap: round;
            stroke-dasharray: 377;
            stroke-dashoffset: 377;
            transition: stroke-dashoffset 0.1s linear;
            filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(39,174,96,0.8));
        }

        #collect-progress .progress-text {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            font-size: 20px;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            color: #fff;
            text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
        }

        /* Item Inventory - at bottom center, same position as instructions */
        #item-inventory {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 90px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            gap: 8px;
            z-index: 15;
        }

        .item-slot {
            width: 84px;
            height: 84px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.8) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 100%);
            border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
            border-radius: 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            position: relative;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .item-slot:hover {
            border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
            transform: scale(1.08);
        }

        .item-slot:active {
            transform: scale(0.95);
        }

        .item-slot .item-icon {
            font-size: 33px;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }

        .item-slot .item-count {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 3px;
            right: 3px;
            font-size: 15px;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            color: #fff;
            text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px #000;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            padding: 1px 4px;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }

        .item-slot .item-key {
            position: absolute;
            top: -12px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-size: 14px;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #ffeb3b;
            text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px #000, 0 0 6px rgba(255,235,59,0.5);
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
            padding: 1px 6px;
            border-radius: 3px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,235,59,0.5);
        }

        .item-slot.cooldown {
            opacity: 0.5;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .item-slot.cooldown::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            border-radius: 9px;
        }

        /* Item Effect Notifications */
        #item-notification {
            position: absolute;
            top: 180px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-size: 24px;
            font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
            color: #fff;
            text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 15;
            text-align: center;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }

        #item-notification.show {
            animation: itemNotify 2s ease-out;
        }

        @keyframes itemNotify {
            0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(20px); }
            20% { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
            80% { opacity: 1; }
            100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-20px); }
        }

        /* Active Effect Overlays */
        #effect-overlays {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 9;
        }

        /* Overdrive Effect - Electric border */
        #overdrive-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border: 8px solid transparent;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        #overdrive-overlay.active {
            opacity: 1;
            border-color: #ffdd00;
            box-shadow: inset 0 0 60px rgba(255,221,0,0.4), inset 0 0 120px rgba(255,150,0,0.2);
            animation: overdriveGlow 0.5s infinite alternate;
        }

        @keyframes overdriveGlow {
            0% { box-shadow: inset 0 0 60px rgba(255,221,0,0.4), inset 0 0 120px rgba(255,150,0,0.2); }
            100% { box-shadow: inset 0 0 80px rgba(255,221,0,0.6), inset 0 0 150px rgba(255,150,0,0.3); }
        }

        /* Shield Effect - Blue protective border */
        #shield-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border: 6px solid transparent;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        #shield-overlay.active {
            opacity: 1;
            border-color: #3498db;
            box-shadow: inset 0 0 80px rgba(52,152,219,0.4), inset 0 0 150px rgba(52,152,219,0.2);
            animation: shieldGlow 1s infinite alternate;
        }

        @keyframes shieldGlow {
            0% { box-shadow: inset 0 0 80px rgba(52,152,219,0.4), inset 0 0 150px rgba(52,152,219,0.2); }
            100% { box-shadow: inset 0 0 100px rgba(52,152,219,0.5), inset 0 0 180px rgba(52,152,219,0.3); }
        }

        /* Freeze Effect - Frost border */
        #freeze-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border: 10px solid transparent;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }

        #freeze-overlay.active {
            opacity: 1;
            border-color: #a8e6ff;
            box-shadow: inset 0 0 100px rgba(168,230,255,0.5), inset 0 0 200px rgba(100,200,255,0.3);
            animation: freezeGlow 0.8s infinite alternate;
        }

        @keyframes freezeGlow {
            0% { box-shadow: inset 0 0 100px rgba(168,230,255,0.5), inset 0 0 200px rgba(100,200,255,0.3); }
            100% { box-shadow: inset 0 0 120px rgba(168,230,255,0.6), inset 0 0 220px rgba(100,200,255,0.4); }
        }

        /* Low Health Effect - Red pulsing vignette */
        #low-health-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 30%, rgba(255,100,100,0.2) 70%, rgba(220,80,80,0.35) 100%);
        }

        #low-health-overlay.active {
            opacity: 1;
            animation: lowHealthPulse 0.5s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        @keyframes lowHealthPulse {
            0%, 100% { 
                opacity: 0.7;
                background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 25%, rgba(255,100,100,0.22) 65%, rgba(220,80,80,0.38) 100%);
            }
            50% { 
                opacity: 1;
                background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 20%, rgba(255,120,120,0.3) 60%, rgba(240,100,100,0.5) 100%);
            }
        }

        /* Sonic Wave Distortion Effect */
        #sonic-distortion-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 0;
            z-index: 14;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(170,100,255,0.3) 0%, rgba(100,50,200,0.2) 50%, transparent 80%);
            transition: opacity 0.1s ease;
        }

        #sonic-distortion-overlay.active {
            opacity: 1;
            animation: sonicDistortion 0.8s ease-out;
        }

        @keyframes sonicDistortion {
            0% { 
                opacity: 1;
                filter: blur(0px);
                transform: scale(1);
            }
            25% {
                opacity: 1;
                filter: blur(4px);
                transform: scale(1.02);
            }
            50% {
                opacity: 0.8;
                filter: blur(2px);
                transform: scale(0.98);
            }
            75% {
                opacity: 0.5;
                filter: blur(1px);
                transform: scale(1.01);
            }
            100% { 
                opacity: 0;
                filter: blur(0px);
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }

        /* Active Effect Timers */
        #active-effects {
            position: absolute;
            top: 80px;
            left: var(--space-sm);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            z-index: 15;
        }

        .effect-timer {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
