                        playBoneThrowSound();
                        
                        // Flash animation
                        this.flashAttack();
                    } else if (this.isScreamer) {
                        // Emit sonic wave from head
                        const screamPos = zombiePos.clone();
                        screamPos.y += 1.6;
                        
                        const wave = new SonicWave(screamPos, targetPos);
                        sonicWaves.push(wave);
                        
                        // Play screamer sound
                        playScreamerSound();
                        
                        // Flash purple instead of red
                        const flashMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xaa66ff });
                        const originalMats = [];
                        
                        this.group.traverse((child) => {
                            if (child.isMesh && child.material) {
                                originalMats.push({ mesh: child, mat: child.material });
                                if (Array.isArray(child.material)) {
                                    child.material = child.material.map(() => flashMat);
                                } else {
                                    child.material = flashMat;
                                }
                            }
                        });
                        
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            originalMats.forEach(({ mesh, mat }) => {
                                mesh.material = mat;
                            });
                        }, 300);
                    }
                }
                
                destroy() {
                    scene.remove(this.group);
                }
                
                // Get bounding box for hit detection
                getBoundingBox() {
                    const pos = this.group.position;
                    if (this.isCrawler) {
                        return {
                            min: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x - ZOMBIE_WIDTH/2, pos.y, pos.z - 0.5),
                            max: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x + ZOMBIE_WIDTH/2, pos.y + 0.6, pos.z + 0.5)
                        };
                    }
                    const widthScale = this.isGiant ? (6.4 / 1.95 * 1.5) : (this.isRunner ? 0.8 : 1);
                    return {
                        min: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x - (ZOMBIE_WIDTH * widthScale)/2, pos.y, pos.z - 0.2 * widthScale),
                        max: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x + (ZOMBIE_WIDTH * widthScale)/2, pos.y + this.zombieHeight, pos.z + 0.2 * widthScale)
                    };
                }
                
                getHeadBox() {
                    const pos = this.group.position;
                    // Larger hitbox to match visual head size (zombie scale is 1.95)
                    if (this.isCrawler) {
                        // Crawler head is at local position (0, 0.35, 0.6)
                        // Need to calculate world position based on zombie rotation
                        const headLocalPos = new THREE.Vector3(0, 0.35, 0.6);
                        headLocalPos.applyQuaternion(this.group.quaternion);
                        const headWorldPos = pos.clone().add(headLocalPos);
                        // Larger, more forgiving hitbox for crawlers
                        const hitboxSize = 0.6;
                        return {
                            min: new THREE.Vector3(headWorldPos.x - hitboxSize, headWorldPos.y - 0.3, headWorldPos.z - hitboxSize),
                            max: new THREE.Vector3(headWorldPos.x + hitboxSize, headWorldPos.y + 0.5, headWorldPos.z + hitboxSize)
                        };
                    }
                    // Giant zombie has smaller head (30%) but scaled body - adjust hitbox accordingly
                    if (this.isGiant) {
                        const headY = this.headYPos || 6.49; // Use stored Y or calculated default
                        const headSize = 0.5 * 6.4 * 0.3 / 2; // Half of head size
                        return {
                            min: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x - headSize - 0.2, pos.y + headY - headSize - 0.2, pos.z - headSize - 0.2),
                            max: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x + headSize + 0.2, pos.y + headY + headSize + 0.2, pos.z + headSize + 0.2)
                        };
                    }
                    return {
                        min: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x - 0.45, pos.y + 1.35, pos.z - 0.45),
                        max: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x + 0.45, pos.y + 2.05, pos.z + 0.45)
                    };
                }
            }

            // ==================== ZOMBIE BAT CLASS ====================
            // Flying enemy that spawns in groups, fast but fragile
            
            class ZombieBat {
                constructor(spawnAngle, groupOffset = 0) {
                    this.group = new THREE.Group();
                    
                    // Spawn from the sky at edge of map
                    const spawnDist = SPAWN_RADIUS + 10;
                    const x = Math.cos(spawnAngle) * spawnDist + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 10;
                    const z = Math.sin(spawnAngle) * spawnDist + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 10;
                    const y = 20 + Math.random() * 15 + groupOffset * 2; // Stagger height in group
                    
                    this.group.position.set(x, y, z);
                    
                    // Bat properties
                    this.health = 1; // One-shot kill
                    this.speed = 5 + Math.random() * 2; // Moderate speed (reduced from 12-16)
                    this.attackDamage = 1; // Very low damage
                    this.alive = true;
                    this.dying = false;
                    this.deathTime = 0;
                    this.attackCooldown = 0;
                    
                    // Flight pattern variables
                    this.flightPhase = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    this.verticalPhase = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    this.horizontalPhase = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    this.baseHeight = y;
                    this.swoopTimer = 0;
                    this.isSwooping = false;
                    this.swoopTarget = null;
                    
                    // Smoother movement parameters (unique per bat)
                    this.verticalAmplitude = 0.6 + Math.random() * 0.6; // Gentler vertical bob
                    this.horizontalAmplitude = 0.8 + Math.random() * 0.8; // Less horizontal weave
                    this.flightSpeed = 1.2 + Math.random() * 0.8; // Slower pattern animation
                    this.directionChangeTimer = Math.random() * 3 + 1; // Less frequent direction changes
                    this.currentSwerve = 0;
                    this.targetSwerve = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.8; // Much less swerving
                    
                    // Wing flap animation
                    this.wingPhase = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    this.wingSpeed = 15 + Math.random() * 5; // Fast wing flaps
                    
                    // Sound timers
                    this.wingFlapTimer = Math.random() * 0.3; // Stagger initial flap sounds
                    this.wingFlapInterval = 0.4 + Math.random() * 0.2; // Play wing sound every ~0.4-0.6 seconds
                    
                    // Create bat mesh (Minecraft style blocky bat)
                    this.createBatMesh();
                    
                    scene.add(this.group);
                }
                
                createBatMesh() {
                    const batScale = 0.6; // 50% larger than before
                    
                    // Bat body material - dark purple/black
                    const batBodyCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                    batBodyCanvas.width = 16;
                    batBodyCanvas.height = 16;
                    const ctx = batBodyCanvas.getContext('2d');
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#2a1a2a';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 16, 16);
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#3a2a3a';
                    ctx.fillRect(2, 2, 6, 6);
                    ctx.fillRect(8, 8, 6, 6);
                    // Red eyes
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#ff0000';
                    ctx.fillRect(4, 5, 2, 2);
                    ctx.fillRect(10, 5, 2, 2);
                    
                    const batTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(batBodyCanvas);
                    batTex.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                    const batMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: batTex });
                    
                    // Wing material - darker, membrane-like
                    const wingCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                    wingCanvas.width = 16;
                    wingCanvas.height = 16;
                    const wCtx = wingCanvas.getContext('2d');
                    wCtx.fillStyle = '#1a0a1a';
                    wCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 16, 16);
                    // Wing membrane lines
                    wCtx.fillStyle = '#2a1a2a';
                    for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                        wCtx.fillRect(i * 4, 0, 2, 16);
                    }
                    
                    const wingTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(wingCanvas);
                    wingTex.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                    const wingMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ 
                        map: wingTex, 
                        side: THREE.DoubleSide,
                        transparent: true,
                        opacity: 0.9
                    });
                    
                    // Body (small oval)
                    const bodyGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.3 * batScale, 0.25 * batScale, 0.4 * batScale);
                    const body = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeo, batMat);
                    this.group.add(body);
                    this.body = body;
                    
                    // Head
                    const headGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.25 * batScale, 0.2 * batScale, 0.2 * batScale);
                    const head = new THREE.Mesh(headGeo, batMat);
                    head.position.set(0, 0.05 * batScale, 0.25 * batScale);
                    this.group.add(head);
                    this.head = head;
                    
                    // Ears (small triangular)
                    const earGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.06 * batScale, 0.12 * batScale, 0.04 * batScale);
                    const leftEar = new THREE.Mesh(earGeo, batMat);
                    leftEar.position.set(-0.08 * batScale, 0.15 * batScale, 0.25 * batScale);
                    this.group.add(leftEar);
                    
                    const rightEar = new THREE.Mesh(earGeo, batMat);
                    rightEar.position.set(0.08 * batScale, 0.15 * batScale, 0.25 * batScale);
                    this.group.add(rightEar);
                    
                    // Left wing pivot
                    this.leftWingPivot = new THREE.Group();
                    this.leftWingPivot.position.set(-0.12 * batScale, 0, 0);
                    
                    const leftWingGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5 * batScale, 0.02 * batScale, 0.35 * batScale);
                    const leftWing = new THREE.Mesh(leftWingGeo, wingMat);
                    leftWing.position.set(-0.25 * batScale, 0, 0);
                    this.leftWingPivot.add(leftWing);
                    this.group.add(this.leftWingPivot);
                    
                    // Right wing pivot
                    this.rightWingPivot = new THREE.Group();
                    this.rightWingPivot.position.set(0.12 * batScale, 0, 0);
                    
                    const rightWingGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5 * batScale, 0.02 * batScale, 0.35 * batScale);
                    const rightWing = new THREE.Mesh(rightWingGeo, wingMat);
                    rightWing.position.set(0.25 * batScale, 0, 0);
                    this.rightWingPivot.add(rightWing);
                    this.group.add(this.rightWingPivot);
                }
                
                update(dt) {
                    if (this.dying) {
                        this.deathTime += dt;
                        
                        // Falling death animation - tumble down
                        this.group.position.y -= 15 * dt;
                        this.group.rotation.x += dt * 8;
                        this.group.rotation.z += dt * 5;
                        
                        // Still flap wings erratically while falling
                        this.wingPhase += dt * this.wingSpeed * 0.5;
                        const flapAngle = Math.sin(this.wingPhase) * 0.3;
                        this.leftWingPivot.rotation.z = flapAngle;
                        this.rightWingPivot.rotation.z = -flapAngle;
                        
                        // Remove after falling far enough
                        if (this.group.position.y < -20 || this.deathTime > 3) {
                            this.alive = false;
                        }
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    if (!this.alive) return;
                    
                    // Get direction to player
                    let targetX = 0;
                    let targetZ = 0;
                    
                    // Track player position if they're moving
                    if (playerMovementState !== 'idle') {
                        targetX = camera.position.x;
                        targetZ = camera.position.z;
                    }
                    
                    const toPlayer = new THREE.Vector3(targetX - this.group.position.x, 0, targetZ - this.group.position.z);
                    const distToPlayer = toPlayer.length();
                    toPlayer.normalize();
                    
                    // Update flight phases
                    this.flightPhase += dt * this.flightSpeed;
                    this.verticalPhase += dt * (this.flightSpeed * 1.3);
                    this.horizontalPhase += dt * (this.flightSpeed * 0.7);
                    
                    // Gentler direction changes
                    this.directionChangeTimer -= dt;
                    if (this.directionChangeTimer <= 0) {
                        this.targetSwerve = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.8; // Much gentler swerve
                        this.directionChangeTimer = 2 + Math.random() * 2; // Less frequent changes
                    }
                    this.currentSwerve += (this.targetSwerve - this.currentSwerve) * dt * 1.5; // Slower swerve transition
                    
                    // Calculate erratic offset for bat-like movement
                    const verticalOffset = Math.sin(this.verticalPhase) * this.verticalAmplitude;
                    const horizontalOffset = Math.sin(this.horizontalPhase) * this.horizontalAmplitude;
                    
                    // Perpendicular vector for sideways movement
                    const perpX = -toPlayer.z;
                    const perpZ = toPlayer.x;
                    
                    // Move toward player with erratic pattern
                    const moveSpeed = this.speed * dt;
                    
                    // Stop inside sandbags - slightly inside the sandbag perimeter (SANDBAG_RADIUS = 4)
                    const minAttackDistance = 3.5; // Inside sandbags, close to player
                    if (distToPlayer > minAttackDistance) {
                        this.group.position.x += (toPlayer.x + perpX * this.currentSwerve * 0.3) * moveSpeed;
                        this.group.position.z += (toPlayer.z + perpZ * this.currentSwerve * 0.3) * moveSpeed;
                    } else {
                        // If too close, move away to maintain distance
                        this.group.position.x -= toPlayer.x * moveSpeed * 0.3;
                        this.group.position.z -= toPlayer.z * moveSpeed * 0.3;
                    }
                    
                    // Vertical bobbing - bats fly at eye level, visible without looking down
                    const maxBatHeight = 14.8; // Just below camera height (y=15)
                    const targetHeight = Math.min(maxBatHeight, 14 + verticalOffset * 0.5); // Higher base height, less vertical movement
                    
                    // Swoop down when close to player
                    if (distToPlayer < 15 && !this.isSwooping && Math.random() < 0.02) {
                        this.isSwooping = true;
                        this.swoopTimer = 1.5;
                    }
                    
                    if (this.isSwooping) {
                        this.swoopTimer -= dt;
                        // Dive down slightly toward player, staying at eye level
                        const swoopTarget = Math.min(14.5, 13.5 + Math.sin(this.swoopTimer * 5) * 1);
                        this.group.position.y += (swoopTarget - this.group.position.y) * dt * 5;
                        
                        if (this.swoopTimer <= 0) {
                            this.isSwooping = false;
                        }
                    } else {
                        // Normal flight height with bobbing - cap at max height
                        const clampedHeight = Math.min(maxBatHeight, targetHeight);
                        this.group.position.y += (clampedHeight - this.group.position.y) * dt * 2;
                    }
                    
                    // Add horizontal offset for gentle weaving movement
                    this.group.position.x += perpX * horizontalOffset * dt * 0.8;
                    this.group.position.z += perpZ * horizontalOffset * dt * 0.8;
                    
                    // Wing flapping animation - fast!
                    this.wingPhase += dt * this.wingSpeed;
                    const flapAngle = Math.sin(this.wingPhase) * 0.8; // Wide flap
                    this.leftWingPivot.rotation.z = flapAngle;
                    this.rightWingPivot.rotation.z = -flapAngle;
                    
                    // Play wing flap sounds periodically
                    this.wingFlapTimer -= dt;
                    if (this.wingFlapTimer <= 0) {
                        playBatWingFlap(this);
                        this.wingFlapTimer = this.wingFlapInterval;
                    }
                    
                    // Body tilts based on movement
                    this.body.rotation.x = Math.sin(this.flightPhase * 0.5) * 0.2;
                    this.body.rotation.z = this.currentSwerve * 0.3;
                    
                    // Face direction of movement (roughly toward player)
                    this.group.lookAt(targetX, this.group.position.y, targetZ);
                    
                    // Attack cooldown
                    if (this.attackCooldown > 0) {
                        this.attackCooldown -= dt;
                    }
                }
                
                takeDamage() {
                    if (this.dying) return { killed: false };
                    
                    this.health -= 1;
                    
                    if (this.health <= 0) {
                        this.dying = true;
                        return { killed: true };
                    }
                    return { killed: false };
                }
                
                canAttackPlayer() {
                    const pos = this.group.position;
                    const distHorizontal = Math.sqrt(pos.x ** 2 + pos.z ** 2);
                    // Attack from inside sandbags - close to player
                    return distHorizontal < 4.5 && distHorizontal > 2.5 && !this.dying && this.attackCooldown <= 0;
                }
                
                attackPlayer() {
                    if (this.attackCooldown <= 0) {
                        this.attackCooldown = 2.56; // Reduced attack rate (60% less frequent)
                        // Play bat screech when attacking
                        playBatScreech(this);
                        return this.attackDamage;
                    }
                    return 0;
                }
                
                getWorldPosition() {
                    return this.group.position.clone();
                }
                
                getBoundingBox() {
                    const pos = this.group.position;
                    // Small hitbox for bat
                    return {
                        min: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x - 0.4, pos.y - 0.2, pos.z - 0.3),
                        max: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x + 0.4, pos.y + 0.3, pos.z + 0.3)
                    };
                }
                
                destroy() {
                    scene.remove(this.group);
                }
            }
            
            // Track if a bat group is currently active
            let batGroupActive = false;
            
            // Check if bat group can spawn (no existing bats alive)
            function canSpawnBatGroup() {
                // Check if any bats are still alive
                const aliveBats = zombieBats.filter(b => b.alive && !b.dying).length;
                return aliveBats === 0;
            }
            
            // Spawn a group of bats
            function spawnBatGroup() {
                // Don't spawn if there's already an active bat group
                if (!canSpawnBatGroup()) {
                    return 0; // Return 0 - no bats spawned
                }
                
                // Group size scales with wave number
                // Wave 1: 3-5, Wave 2: 3-6, Wave 3: 3-7, etc.
                // Min is always 3, max increases by 1 per wave, capped by config
                const minBats = 3;
                const maxBatsCap = config.gameplay.maxBatsPerGroup || 8;
                const maxBats = Math.min(3 + currentWave, maxBatsCap);
                const groupSize = minBats + Math.floor(Math.random() * (maxBats - minBats + 1));
                
                const spawnAngle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                
                for (let i = 0; i < groupSize; i++) {
                    // Slight angle variation within group
                    const angleOffset = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
                    const bat = new ZombieBat(spawnAngle + angleOffset, i);
                    
                    // Apply freeze effect if active
                    if (freezeActive) {
                        bat.originalSpeed = bat.speed;
                        bat.speed *= 0.3;
                    }
                    
                    zombieBats.push(bat);
                }
                
                batGroupActive = true;
                
                // Count as spawned enemies
                return groupSize;
            }

            // ==================== ZOMBIE DOG CLASS ====================
            // Ground-based pack animal that spawns in groups, fast and aggressive
            
            const zombieDogs = [];
            let dogGroupActive = false;
            
            class ZombieDog {
                constructor(spawnAngle, groupOffset = 0) {
                    this.group = new THREE.Group();
                    
                    // Spawn at edge of map on ground level
                    const spawnDist = SPAWN_RADIUS + 5;
                    const x = Math.cos(spawnAngle) * spawnDist + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8;
                    const z = Math.sin(spawnAngle) * spawnDist + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8;
                    
                    this.group.position.set(x, SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y, z);
                    
                    // Dog properties - fast, low health, moderate damage
                    this.health = 1; // One-shot kill like bats
                    this.speed = 8 + Math.random() * 3; // Fast runners
                    this.attackDamage = 5; // Moderate damage
                    this.alive = true;
                    this.dying = false;
                    this.deathTime = 0;
                    this.attackCooldown = 0;
                    
                    // Movement pattern variables
                    this.runPhase = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    this.directionChangeTimer = Math.random() * 2 + 0.5;
                    this.currentSwerve = 0;
                    this.targetSwerve = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.6;
                    
                    // Animation
                    this.legPhase = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    this.legSpeed = 20 + Math.random() * 5; // Fast leg movement
                    
                    // Climbing / Jumping over sandbags
                    this.isClimbing = false;
                    this.climbProgress = 0;
                    this.hasClimbed = false;
                    this.climbStartY = 0;
                    this.CLIMB_DURATION = 0.6; // 0.6s jump
                    
                    // Pounce attack animation state
                    this.isPouncing = false;
                    this.pounceProgress = 0;
                    this.POUNCE_DURATION = 0.5; // 0.5s pounce attack
                    this.pounceStartY = 0;
                    
                    // Create dog mesh
                    this.createDogMesh();
                    
                    scene.add(this.group);
                }
                
                createDogMesh() {
                    const dogScale = 1.8; // 50% larger again (1.2 * 1.5 = 1.8)
                    
                    // Dog body material - black/dark brown with green blood stains
                    const dogBodyCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                    dogBodyCanvas.width = 32;
                    dogBodyCanvas.height = 32;
                    const ctx = dogBodyCanvas.getContext('2d');
                    // Base dark black-brown color
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a18';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 32, 32);
                    // Dark brown patches
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#2a2018';
                    ctx.fillRect(2, 2, 12, 12);
                    ctx.fillRect(18, 18, 12, 12);
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#3a2a1a';
                    ctx.fillRect(8, 16, 10, 8);
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 24, 16, 8);
                    // Green blood stains - zombie blood
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#2a5a2a';
                    ctx.fillRect(4, 8, 8, 6);
                    ctx.fillRect(20, 4, 6, 8);
                    ctx.fillRect(12, 20, 10, 6);
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#3a7a3a';
                    ctx.fillRect(6, 10, 4, 3);
                    ctx.fillRect(22, 6, 3, 4);
                    ctx.fillRect(14, 22, 6, 3);
                    // Dripping blood
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#1a4a1a';
                    ctx.fillRect(8, 13, 2, 5);
                    ctx.fillRect(24, 10, 2, 6);
                    ctx.fillRect(16, 25, 2, 5);
                    // Red glowing eyes
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#ff2200';
                    ctx.fillRect(4, 6, 3, 3);
                    ctx.fillRect(12, 6, 3, 3);
                    // Sharp teeth
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
                    ctx.fillRect(6, 14, 2, 3);
                    ctx.fillRect(10, 14, 2, 3);
                    
                    const dogTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(dogBodyCanvas);
                    dogTex.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                    const dogMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: dogTex });
                    
                    // Darker leg material - black
                    const legMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x1a1510 });
                    
                    // Body (elongated but thinner - reduced width and height)
                    const bodyGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.22 * dogScale, 0.16 * dogScale, 0.7 * dogScale);
                    const body = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeo, dogMat);
                    body.position.y = 0.35 * dogScale;
                    this.group.add(body);
                    this.body = body;
                    
                    // Head (slightly thinner)
                    const headGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.18 * dogScale, 0.15 * dogScale, 0.28 * dogScale);
                    const head = new THREE.Mesh(headGeo, dogMat);
                    head.position.set(0, 0.4 * dogScale, 0.45 * dogScale);
                    this.group.add(head);
                    this.head = head;
                    
                    // Snout (thinner)
                    const snoutGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.08 * dogScale, 0.07 * dogScale, 0.15 * dogScale);
                    const snout = new THREE.Mesh(snoutGeo, dogMat);
                    snout.position.set(0, 0.35 * dogScale, 0.6 * dogScale);
                    this.group.add(snout);
                    
                    // Ears (thinner)
                    const earGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.05 * dogScale, 0.1 * dogScale, 0.04 * dogScale);
                    const leftEar = new THREE.Mesh(earGeo, dogMat);
                    leftEar.position.set(-0.08 * dogScale, 0.52 * dogScale, 0.4 * dogScale);
                    leftEar.rotation.z = 0.3;
                    this.group.add(leftEar);
                    
                    const rightEar = new THREE.Mesh(earGeo, dogMat);
                    rightEar.position.set(0.08 * dogScale, 0.52 * dogScale, 0.4 * dogScale);
                    rightEar.rotation.z = -0.3;
                    this.group.add(rightEar);
                    
                    // Front legs pivots (thinner legs)
                    this.frontLeftLegPivot = new THREE.Group();
                    this.frontLeftLegPivot.position.set(-0.08 * dogScale, 0.25 * dogScale, 0.2 * dogScale);
                    const frontLeftLeg = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.05 * dogScale, 0.28 * dogScale, 0.05 * dogScale), legMat);
                    frontLeftLeg.position.y = -0.14 * dogScale;
                    this.frontLeftLegPivot.add(frontLeftLeg);
                    this.group.add(this.frontLeftLegPivot);
                    
                    this.frontRightLegPivot = new THREE.Group();
                    this.frontRightLegPivot.position.set(0.08 * dogScale, 0.25 * dogScale, 0.2 * dogScale);
                    const frontRightLeg = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.05 * dogScale, 0.28 * dogScale, 0.05 * dogScale), legMat);
                    frontRightLeg.position.y = -0.14 * dogScale;
                    this.frontRightLegPivot.add(frontRightLeg);
                    this.group.add(this.frontRightLegPivot);
                    
                    // Back legs pivots (thinner legs)
                    this.backLeftLegPivot = new THREE.Group();
                    this.backLeftLegPivot.position.set(-0.08 * dogScale, 0.25 * dogScale, -0.2 * dogScale);
                    const backLeftLeg = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.05 * dogScale, 0.28 * dogScale, 0.05 * dogScale), legMat);
                    backLeftLeg.position.y = -0.14 * dogScale;
                    this.backLeftLegPivot.add(backLeftLeg);
                    this.group.add(this.backLeftLegPivot);
                    
                    this.backRightLegPivot = new THREE.Group();
                    this.backRightLegPivot.position.set(0.08 * dogScale, 0.25 * dogScale, -0.2 * dogScale);
                    const backRightLeg = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.05 * dogScale, 0.28 * dogScale, 0.05 * dogScale), legMat);
                    backRightLeg.position.y = -0.14 * dogScale;
                    this.backRightLegPivot.add(backRightLeg);
                    this.group.add(this.backRightLegPivot);
                    
                    // Tail (thinner)
                    const tailGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.04 * dogScale, 0.04 * dogScale, 0.2 * dogScale);
                    const tail = new THREE.Mesh(tailGeo, dogMat);
                    tail.position.set(0, 0.4 * dogScale, -0.45 * dogScale);
                    tail.rotation.x = -0.5;
                    this.group.add(tail);
                    this.tail = tail;
                }
                
                update(dt) {
                    if (this.dying) {
                        this.deathTime += dt;
                        
                        // Falling death animation - roll over
                        this.group.rotation.z += dt * 6;
                        this.group.position.y -= 3 * dt;
                        
                        if (this.deathTime > 2) {
                            this.alive = false;
                        }
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    if (!this.alive) return;
                    
                    // Get direction to player
                    let targetX = 0;
                    let targetZ = 0;
                    
                    if (playerMovementState !== 'idle') {
                        targetX = camera.position.x;
                        targetZ = camera.position.z;
                    }
                    
                    const toPlayer = new THREE.Vector3(targetX - this.group.position.x, 0, targetZ - this.group.position.z);
                    const distToPlayer = toPlayer.length();
                    toPlayer.normalize();
                    
                    const playerAtHilltop = playerMovementState === 'idle';
                    
                    // Check if dog needs to jump over sandbags
                    const distToCenter = Math.sqrt(this.group.position.x ** 2 + this.group.position.z ** 2);
                    
                    if (!this.hasClimbed && !this.isClimbing && playerAtHilltop && distToCenter <= SANDBAG_RADIUS + 1.5) {
                        this.isClimbing = true;
                        this.climbProgress = 0;
                        this.climbStartY = this.group.position.y;
                    }
                    
                    if (this.isClimbing) {
                        this.climbProgress += dt / this.CLIMB_DURATION;
                        
                        const climbEase = Math.sin(this.climbProgress * Math.PI);
                        
                        // Jump from outer sandbag distance to inner edge
                        const jumpSpeed = 2.5 / this.CLIMB_DURATION;
                        this.group.position.x += toPlayer.x * jumpSpeed * dt;
                        this.group.position.z += toPlayer.z * jumpSpeed * dt;
                        
                        this.group.position.y = this.climbStartY + climbEase * 2.0;
                        
                        this.body.rotation.x = -Math.sin(this.climbProgress * Math.PI * 2) * 0.4;
                        
                        // Tuck legs while jumping
                        this.frontLeftLegPivot.rotation.x = 0.5;
                        this.frontRightLegPivot.rotation.x = 0.5;
                        this.backLeftLegPivot.rotation.x = 0.5;
                        this.backRightLegPivot.rotation.x = 0.5;
                        
                        if (this.climbProgress >= 1) {
                            this.isClimbing = false;
                            this.hasClimbed = true;
                            this.body.rotation.x = 0;
                        }
                        
                        this.group.lookAt(targetX, this.group.position.y, targetZ);
                        
                        if (this.attackCooldown > 0) {
                            this.attackCooldown -= dt;
                        }
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    // Direction changes for pack behavior
                    this.directionChangeTimer -= dt;
                    if (this.directionChangeTimer <= 0) {
                        this.targetSwerve = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.6;
                        this.directionChangeTimer = 1 + Math.random() * 1.5;
                    }
                    this.currentSwerve += (this.targetSwerve - this.currentSwerve) * dt * 3;
                    
                    // Perpendicular vector for sideways movement
                    const perpX = -toPlayer.z;
                    const perpZ = toPlayer.x;
                    
                    // Move toward player
                    const moveSpeed = this.speed * dt;
                    // Dogs run inside sandbags to attack, staying near inner edge
                    const minAttackDistance = 3.0;
                    
                    if (distToPlayer > minAttackDistance) {
                        this.group.position.x += (toPlayer.x + perpX * this.currentSwerve * 0.4) * moveSpeed;
                        this.group.position.z += (toPlayer.z + perpZ * this.currentSwerve * 0.4) * moveSpeed;
                    } else {
                        // Move back if too close
                        this.group.position.x -= toPlayer.x * moveSpeed * 0.5;
                        this.group.position.z -= toPlayer.z * moveSpeed * 0.5;
                    }
                    
                    // Calculate height on slope
                    const newDist = Math.sqrt(this.group.position.x ** 2 + this.group.position.z ** 2);
                    let groundY;
                    if (this.hasClimbed && playerAtHilltop && newDist <= SANDBAG_RADIUS + 1.0) {
                        groundY = 10.5; // Top platform height!
                    } else if (newDist <= HILLTOP_RADIUS) {
                        groundY = 10.0;
                    } else if (newDist >= SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS) {
                        groundY = SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y;
                    } else {
                        const t = (newDist - HILLTOP_RADIUS) / (SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS - HILLTOP_RADIUS);
                        groundY = HILLTOP_Y - Math.pow(t, 0.7) * (HILLTOP_Y - SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y) + 0.5;
                    }
                    this.group.position.y = groundY;
                    
                    // Handle pounce attack animation
                    if (this.isPouncing) {
                        this.pounceProgress += dt / this.POUNCE_DURATION;
                        
                        // Pounce arc animation
                        const pouncePhase = Math.min(this.pounceProgress, 1);
                        const jumpArc = Math.sin(pouncePhase * Math.PI); // Arc up then down
                        
                        // Jump height
                        this.group.position.y = this.pounceStartY + jumpArc * 2.5;
                        
                        // Lunge forward during pounce
                        const lungeSpeed = 8 * dt;
                        this.group.position.x += toPlayer.x * lungeSpeed;
                        this.group.position.z += toPlayer.z * lungeSpeed;
                        
                        // Front legs extended forward for attack
                        this.frontLeftLegPivot.rotation.x = -1.2 + pouncePhase * 0.8;
                        this.frontRightLegPivot.rotation.x = -1.2 + pouncePhase * 0.8;
                        // Back legs tucked then extended
                        this.backLeftLegPivot.rotation.x = 0.8 - pouncePhase * 1.2;
                        this.backRightLegPivot.rotation.x = 0.8 - pouncePhase * 1.2;
                        
                        // Body tilts forward aggressively
                        this.body.rotation.x = -0.4 + pouncePhase * 0.6;
                        
                        // Head lunges forward
                        if (this.head) {
                            this.head.rotation.x = 0.3 - pouncePhase * 0.4;
                        }
                        
                        if (this.pounceProgress >= 1) {
                            this.isPouncing = false;
                            this.pounceProgress = 0;
                            // Reset body rotation
                            this.body.rotation.x = 0;
                            if (this.head) this.head.rotation.x = 0;
                        }
                        
                        // Face player during pounce
                        this.group.lookAt(targetX, this.group.position.y, targetZ);
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    // Running animation
                    this.legPhase += dt * this.legSpeed;
                    const legSwing = Math.sin(this.legPhase) * 0.8;
                    
                    // Front legs move opposite to back legs (gallop)
                    this.frontLeftLegPivot.rotation.x = legSwing;
                    this.frontRightLegPivot.rotation.x = -legSwing;
                    this.backLeftLegPivot.rotation.x = -legSwing;
                    this.backRightLegPivot.rotation.x = legSwing;
                    
                    // Body bob
                    this.body.position.y = 0.35 * 0.8 + Math.abs(Math.sin(this.legPhase * 2)) * 0.05;
                    this.body.rotation.x = Math.sin(this.legPhase) * 0.1;
                    
                    // Tail wag
                    this.tail.rotation.y = Math.sin(this.legPhase * 1.5) * 0.4;
                    
                    // Face player
                    this.group.lookAt(targetX, this.group.position.y, targetZ);
                    
                    // Attack cooldown
                    if (this.attackCooldown > 0) {
                        this.attackCooldown -= dt;
                    }
                }
                
                takeDamage() {
                    if (this.dying) return { killed: false };
                    
                    this.health -= 1;
                    
                    if (this.health <= 0) {
                        this.dying = true;
                        return { killed: true };
                    }
                    return { killed: false };
                }
                
                canAttackPlayer() {
                    const pos = this.group.position;
                    const distHorizontal = Math.sqrt(pos.x ** 2 + pos.z ** 2);
                    // Dogs attack from just inside the sandbag perimeter (near inner edge)
                    return this.hasClimbed && distHorizontal <= 3.5 && !this.dying && this.attackCooldown <= 0;
                }
                
                attackPlayer() {
                    if (this.attackCooldown <= 0 && !this.isPouncing) {
                        this.attackCooldown = 1.8; // Attack every 1.8 seconds
                        // Start pounce attack animation
                        this.isPouncing = true;
                        this.pounceProgress = 0;
                        this.pounceStartY = this.group.position.y;
                        playZombieAttack();
                        return this.attackDamage;
                    }
                    return 0;
                }
                
                getWorldPosition() {
                    return this.group.position.clone();
                }
                
                getBoundingBox() {
                    const pos = this.group.position;
                    return {
                        min: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x - 0.3, pos.y, pos.z - 0.4),
                        max: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x + 0.3, pos.y + 0.5, pos.z + 0.4)
                    };
                }
                
                destroy() {
                    scene.remove(this.group);
                }
            }
            
            // Check if dog pack can spawn (no existing dogs alive)
            function canSpawnDogPack() {
                const aliveDogs = zombieDogs.filter(d => d.alive && !d.dying).length;
                return aliveDogs === 0;
            }
            
            // Spawn a pack of zombie dogs
            function spawnDogPack() {
                if (!canSpawnDogPack()) {
                    return 0;
                }
                
                const minDogs = 3;
                const maxDogsCap = config.gameplay.maxDogsPerGroup ?? config.gameplay.maxBatsPerGroup ?? 8;
                const maxDogs = Math.min(3 + currentWave, maxDogsCap);
                const packSize = minDogs + Math.floor(Math.random() * (maxDogs - minDogs + 1));
                
                // Calculate spawn angle within current wave's range
                const initialAngle = config.gameplay.spawnAngleInitial || 30;
                const angleIncrement = config.gameplay.spawnAngleIncrement || 30;
                const maxAngle = config.gameplay.spawnAngleMax || 360;
                const waveAngleRange = Math.min(initialAngle + (currentWave - 1) * angleIncrement, maxAngle);
                const halfRangeRadians = (waveAngleRange / 2) * (Math.PI / 180);
                const forwardAngle = -Math.PI / 2;
                const spawnAngle = forwardAngle + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2 * halfRangeRadians;
                
                for (let i = 0; i < packSize; i++) {
                    const angleOffset = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.4;
                    const dog = new ZombieDog(spawnAngle + angleOffset, i);
                    
                    if (freezeActive) {
                        dog.originalSpeed = dog.speed;
                        dog.speed *= 0.3;
                    }
                    
                    zombieDogs.push(dog);
                }
                
                dogGroupActive = true;
                return packSize;
            }

            // ==================== AIRDROP CLASS ====================
            let activeAirdrops = []; // Support multiple airdrops
            const AIRDROP_FALL_SPEED = 8;
            const AIRDROP_FAST_FALL_SPEED = 25;
            
            class Airdrop {
                constructor() {
                    this.group = new THREE.Group();
                    
                    // Calculate spawn angle range based on wave (same as zombies)
                    const initialAngle = config.gameplay.spawnAngleInitial || 30;
                    const angleIncrement = config.gameplay.spawnAngleIncrement || 30;
                    const maxAngle = config.gameplay.spawnAngleMax || 360;
                    
                    // Calculate current wave's spawn angle range
                    const waveAngleRange = Math.min(
                        initialAngle + (currentWave - 1) * angleIncrement,
                        maxAngle
                    );
                    
                    // Convert to radians (half range for +/- from center)
                    const halfRangeRadians = (waveAngleRange / 2) * (Math.PI / 180);
                    
                    // Forward direction is -Z (angle = -π/2 in our coordinate system)
                    const forwardAngle = -Math.PI / 2;
                    
                    // Random angle within the allowed range, centered on forward
                    const angle = forwardAngle + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2 * halfRangeRadians;
                    
                    const minDist = config.airdrop.minDistance;
                    const maxDist = config.airdrop.maxDistance;
                    const dist = minDist + Math.random() * (maxDist - minDist);
                    this.targetX = Math.cos(angle) * dist;
                    this.targetZ = Math.sin(angle) * dist;
                    
                    // Calculate landing Y based on slope
                    const t = (dist - HILLTOP_RADIUS) / (SLOPE_OUTER_RADIUS - HILLTOP_RADIUS);
                    this.landingY = HILLTOP_Y - Math.pow(t, 0.7) * (HILLTOP_Y - SLOPE_BOTTOM_Y) + 1;
                    
                    // Start high in the sky
                    this.group.position.set(this.targetX, 80, this.targetZ);
                    
                    // Parachute
                    this.parachuteHealth = 3;
                    this.parachuteActive = true;
                    
                    // Create parachute mesh
                    const parachuteGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(3, 16, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2, 0, Math.PI / 2);
                    const parachuteMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ 
                        color: 0xff6600, 
                        side: THREE.DoubleSide,
                        transparent: true,
                        opacity: 0.9
                    });
                    this.parachute = new THREE.Mesh(parachuteGeo, parachuteMat);
                    this.parachute.position.y = 5;
                    this.parachute.scale.y = 0.6;
                    this.group.add(this.parachute);
                    
                    // Parachute lines - connect from parachute edge to crate
                    const lineMat = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: 0x888888 });
                    for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
                        const angle = (i / 8) * Math.PI * 2;
                        const points = [
                            new THREE.Vector3(Math.cos(angle) * 2.5, 0, Math.sin(angle) * 2.5),
                            new THREE.Vector3(0, -5, 0)
                        ];
                        const lineGeo = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints(points);
                        const line = new THREE.Line(lineGeo, lineMat);
                        this.parachute.add(line);
                    }
                    
                    // Crate - PUBG style military container
                    this.crate = this.createPUBGCrate();
                    this.group.add(this.crate);
                    
                    scene.add(this.group);
                    
                    this.state = 'falling'; // falling, landed, collecting, collected
                    this.collectProgress = 0;
                    this.fallSpeed = AIRDROP_FALL_SPEED;
                    this.swayPhase = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                    
                    // Create shadow on the ground beneath the falling crate
                    this.createCrateShadow();
                }
                
                // Create shadow mesh that follows the crate on the ground
                createCrateShadow() {
                    // Create an elliptical shadow mesh
                    const shadowGeo = new THREE.CircleGeometry(2.5, 16);
                    const shadowMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
                        color: 0x000000,
                        transparent: true,
                        opacity: 0.4,
                        side: THREE.DoubleSide
                    });
                    this.shadow = new THREE.Mesh(shadowGeo, shadowMat);
                    this.shadow.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; // Lay flat on ground
                    this.shadow.position.set(this.targetX, this.landingY + 0.1, this.targetZ);
                    scene.add(this.shadow);
                }
                
                createPUBGCrate() {
                    // PUBG-style airdrop crate - red body with blue cloth/tarp
                    const crateGroup = new THREE.Group();
                    
                    // Main body - red metal container texture
                    const bodyCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                    bodyCanvas.width = 64;
                    bodyCanvas.height = 64;
                    const ctx = bodyCanvas.getContext('2d');
                    
                    // Red base color
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#cc3333';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 64, 64);
                    
                    // Darker red panels for depth
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#aa2222';
                    ctx.fillRect(2, 2, 28, 28);
                    ctx.fillRect(34, 34, 28, 28);
                    
                    // Metal panel lines
                    ctx.strokeStyle = '#881818';
                    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
                    ctx.strokeRect(4, 4, 56, 56);
                    ctx.strokeRect(8, 8, 48, 48);
                    
                    // Rivets - dark metal
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#333333';
                    for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.arc(8 + i * 16, 8, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.fill();
                        ctx.beginPath();
                        ctx.arc(8 + i * 16, 56, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        ctx.fill();
                    }
                    
                    // White warning stripe
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 28, 64, 8);
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#cc3333';
                    for (let x = 0; x < 64; x += 16) {
                        ctx.fillRect(x, 28, 8, 8);
                    }
                    
                    const bodyTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(bodyCanvas);
                    bodyTex.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                    const bodyMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: bodyTex });
                    
                    // Main container body
                    const mainBody = new THREE.Mesh(
                        new THREE.BoxGeometry(2.2, 1.2, 1.6),
                        bodyMat
                    );
                    crateGroup.add(mainBody);
                    
                    // Blue cloth/tarp covering the top
                    const clothCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                    clothCanvas.width = 64;
                    clothCanvas.height = 64;
                    const clothCtx = clothCanvas.getContext('2d');
                    
                    // Blue tarp base
                    clothCtx.fillStyle = '#2255aa';
                    clothCtx.fillRect(0, 0, 64, 64);
                    
                    // Cloth texture - wrinkles and folds
                    clothCtx.fillStyle = '#1a4488';
                    for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
                        clothCtx.fillRect(i * 8, 0, 4, 64);
                    }
                    clothCtx.fillStyle = '#2866bb';
                    for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
                        clothCtx.fillRect(0, i * 12, 64, 6);
                    }
                    // Highlight folds
                    clothCtx.fillStyle = '#3377cc';
                    clothCtx.fillRect(16, 8, 32, 4);
                    clothCtx.fillRect(8, 32, 48, 4);
                    clothCtx.fillRect(24, 52, 16, 4);
                    
                    const clothTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(clothCanvas);
                    clothTex.magFilter = THREE.NearestFilter;
                    const clothMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ map: clothTex });
                    
                    // Blue tarp on top (slightly draped)
                    const tarpTop = new THREE.Mesh(
                        new THREE.BoxGeometry(2.5, 0.12, 1.9),
                        clothMat
                    );
                    tarpTop.position.y = 0.68;
                    crateGroup.add(tarpTop);
                    
                    // Cloth draping over front side
                    const tarpFront = new THREE.Mesh(
                        new THREE.BoxGeometry(2.5, 0.5, 0.08),
                        clothMat
                    );
                    tarpFront.position.set(0, 0.45, 0.95);
                    tarpFront.rotation.x = 0.15;
                    crateGroup.add(tarpFront);
                    
                    // Cloth draping over back side
                    const tarpBack = new THREE.Mesh(
                        new THREE.BoxGeometry(2.5, 0.4, 0.08),
                        clothMat
                    );
                    tarpBack.position.set(0, 0.5, -0.95);
                    tarpBack.rotation.x = -0.1;
                    crateGroup.add(tarpBack);
                    
                    // Rope/tie around the tarp
                    const ropeMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x8b7355 });
                    const ropeGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(2.6, 0.06, 0.06);
                    const rope1 = new THREE.Mesh(ropeGeo, ropeMat);
                    rope1.position.set(0, 0.76, 0.4);
                    crateGroup.add(rope1);
                    const rope2 = new THREE.Mesh(ropeGeo, ropeMat);
                    rope2.position.set(0, 0.76, -0.4);
                    crateGroup.add(rope2);
                    
                    // Handle on top (through the tarp)
                    const handleMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x333333 });
                    const handle = new THREE.Mesh(
                        new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.6, 0.12, 0.12),
                        handleMat
                    );
                    handle.position.y = 0.82;
                    crateGroup.add(handle);
                    
                    // Corner reinforcements - dark metal
                    const cornerMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x444444 });
                    const corners = [
                        [-1.1, 0, -0.8], [1.1, 0, -0.8],
                        [-1.1, 0, 0.8], [1.1, 0, 0.8]
                    ];
                    corners.forEach(([x, y, z]) => {
                        const corner = new THREE.Mesh(
                            new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.15, 1.3, 0.15),
                            cornerMat
                        );
                        corner.position.set(x, y, z);
                        crateGroup.add(corner);
                    });
                    
                    // Side latches - metal
                    const latchMat = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x666666 });
                    [-0.5, 0.5].forEach(x => {
                        const latch = new THREE.Mesh(
                            new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.2, 0.3, 0.1),
                            latchMat
                        );
                        latch.position.set(x, 0.2, 0.85);
                        crateGroup.add(latch);
                    });
                    
                    // 3D Lock-on effect (initially hidden) - ENHANCED VERSION
                    this.lockOnGroup = new THREE.Group();
                    this.lockOnGroup.visible = false;
                    
                    // Brighter, more visible material
                    const lockOnMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                        color: 0x00ff66, 
                        transparent: true, 
                        opacity: 1.0,
                        side: THREE.DoubleSide
                    });
                    
                    // Outer glow material
                    const lockOnGlowMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                        color: 0x00ff66, 
                        transparent: true, 
                        opacity: 0.4,
                        side: THREE.DoubleSide
                    });
                    
                    // Corner brackets on crate - MUCH LARGER
                    const cornerSize = 0.8;
                    const cornerThickness = 0.08;
                    const cornerOffset = 1.5;
                    const cornerY = 1.0;
                    
                    const lockCorners = [
                        { x: -cornerOffset, z: -1.1, rotY: 0 },
                        { x: cornerOffset, z: -1.1, rotY: Math.PI / 2 },
                        { x: cornerOffset, z: 1.1, rotY: Math.PI },
                        { x: -cornerOffset, z: 1.1, rotY: -Math.PI / 2 }
                    ];
                    
                    this.lockBrackets = []; // Store for animation
                    
                    lockCorners.forEach(corner => {
                        const bracketGroup = new THREE.Group();
                        
                        // Horizontal part - thicker and longer
                        const hGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(cornerSize, cornerThickness, cornerThickness);
                        const hMesh = new THREE.Mesh(hGeo, lockOnMat);
                        hMesh.position.set(cornerSize / 2, 0, 0);
                        bracketGroup.add(hMesh);
                        
                        // Vertical part
                        const vGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(cornerThickness, cornerThickness, cornerSize);
                        const vMesh = new THREE.Mesh(vGeo, lockOnMat);
                        vMesh.position.set(0, 0, cornerSize / 2);
                        bracketGroup.add(vMesh);
                        
                        bracketGroup.position.set(corner.x, cornerY, corner.z);
                        bracketGroup.rotation.y = corner.rotY;
                        bracketGroup.userData.basePos = { x: corner.x, y: cornerY, z: corner.z };
                        this.lockOnGroup.add(bracketGroup);
                        this.lockBrackets.push(bracketGroup);
                    });
                    
                    // Bottom corners
                    lockCorners.forEach(corner => {
                        const bracketGroup = new THREE.Group();
                        
                        const hGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(cornerSize, cornerThickness, cornerThickness);
                        const hMesh = new THREE.Mesh(hGeo, lockOnMat);
                        hMesh.position.set(cornerSize / 2, 0, 0);
                        bracketGroup.add(hMesh);
                        
                        const vGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(cornerThickness, cornerThickness, cornerSize);
                        const vMesh = new THREE.Mesh(vGeo, lockOnMat);
                        vMesh.position.set(0, 0, cornerSize / 2);
                        bracketGroup.add(vMesh);
                        
                        bracketGroup.position.set(corner.x, -cornerY, corner.z);
                        bracketGroup.rotation.y = corner.rotY;
                        bracketGroup.userData.basePos = { x: corner.x, y: -cornerY, z: corner.z };
                        this.lockOnGroup.add(bracketGroup);
                        this.lockBrackets.push(bracketGroup);
                    });
                    
                    // Large rotating diamond indicator on top
                    const diamondGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5, 0.08, 0.5);
                    const diamond = new THREE.Mesh(diamondGeo, lockOnMat);
                    diamond.position.y = 1.5;
                    diamond.rotation.y = Math.PI / 4;
                    this.lockOnGroup.add(diamond);
                    this.lockDiamond = diamond;
                    
                    // Outer rotating ring for extra visibility
                    const ringGeo = new THREE.RingGeometry(1.8, 2.0, 32);
                    const ringMesh = new THREE.Mesh(ringGeo, lockOnGlowMat);
                    ringMesh.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
                    ringMesh.position.y = 0;
                    this.lockOnGroup.add(ringMesh);
                    this.lockRing = ringMesh;
                    
                    // Second inner ring
                    const ring2Geo = new THREE.RingGeometry(1.4, 1.5, 32);
                    const ring2Mesh = new THREE.Mesh(ring2Geo, lockOnMat);
                    ring2Mesh.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
                    ring2Mesh.position.y = 0;
                    this.lockOnGroup.add(ring2Mesh);
                    this.lockRing2 = ring2Mesh;
                    
                    // Vertical scan line effect
                    const scanGeo = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(3.5, 0.1);
                    const scanMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
                        color: 0x00ff66, 
                        transparent: true, 
                        opacity: 0.6,
                        side: THREE.DoubleSide
                    });
                    const scanLine = new THREE.Mesh(scanGeo, scanMat);
                    scanLine.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
                    scanLine.position.y = 0;
                    this.lockOnGroup.add(scanLine);
                    this.lockScanLine = scanLine;
                    
                    crateGroup.add(this.lockOnGroup);
                    
                    return crateGroup;
                }
                
                update(dt) {
                    if (this.state === 'falling') {
                        // Sway while falling
                        this.swayPhase += dt * 2;
                        const sway = Math.sin(this.swayPhase) * 0.5;
                        this.group.rotation.z = sway * 0.1;
                        this.parachute.rotation.y += dt;
                        
                        // Fall
                        this.group.position.y -= this.fallSpeed * dt;
                        
                        // Update shadow - scale based on altitude (smaller when higher)
                        if (this.shadow) {
                            const altitude = this.group.position.y - this.landingY;
                            const maxAltitude = 80 - this.landingY;
                            const shadowScale = 0.5 + (1 - altitude / maxAltitude) * 0.8;
                            this.shadow.scale.set(shadowScale, shadowScale, 1);
                            // Shadow opacity increases as crate gets closer
                            this.shadow.material.opacity = 0.15 + (1 - altitude / maxAltitude) * 0.35;
                        }
                        
                        // Check landing
                        if (this.group.position.y <= this.landingY) {
                            this.group.position.y = this.landingY;
                            this.state = 'landed';
                            this.group.rotation.z = 0;
                            
                            // Hide parachute
                            if (this.parachute) {
                                this.parachute.visible = false;
                            }
                            
                            // Hide shadow when landed
                            if (this.shadow) {
                                this.shadow.visible = false;
                            }
                            
                            // Show collect button
                            showCollectButton();
                        }
                    } else if (this.state === 'collecting') {
                        // Pulse effect while collecting
                        const pulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.01) * 0.05;
                        this.crate.scale.setScalar(pulse);
                    }
                    
                    // Animate lock-on effect if visible - ENHANCED DYNAMIC ANIMATION
                    if (this.lockOnGroup && this.lockOnGroup.visible) {
                        const time = Date.now() * 0.001;
                        
                        // Fast pulsing glow effect
                        const pulse = 0.6 + Math.sin(time * 8) * 0.4;
                        const fastPulse = 0.7 + Math.sin(time * 12) * 0.3;
                        
                        // Animate brackets - breathing/pulsing outward
                        if (this.lockBrackets) {
                            const breathe = 1 + Math.sin(time * 4) * 0.15;
                            this.lockBrackets.forEach((bracket, i) => {
                                if (bracket.userData.basePos) {
                                    const base = bracket.userData.basePos;
                                    const offset = Math.sin(time * 6 + i * 0.5) * 0.1;
                                    bracket.position.x = base.x * (1 + offset * 0.1);
                                    bracket.position.z = base.z * (1 + offset * 0.1);
                                }
                                bracket.scale.setScalar(breathe);
                                bracket.traverse(c => {
                                    if (c.material) c.material.opacity = fastPulse;
                                });
                            });
                        }
                        
                        // Rotate diamond fast with bobbing
                        if (this.lockDiamond) {
                            this.lockDiamond.rotation.y += dt * 5;
                            this.lockDiamond.position.y = 1.5 + Math.sin(time * 6) * 0.15;
                            this.lockDiamond.scale.setScalar(1 + Math.sin(time * 8) * 0.2);
                            if (this.lockDiamond.material) {
                                this.lockDiamond.material.opacity = fastPulse;
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // Rotate outer ring
                        if (this.lockRing) {
                            this.lockRing.rotation.z += dt * 2;
                            this.lockRing.scale.setScalar(1 + Math.sin(time * 3) * 0.1);
                            if (this.lockRing.material) {
                                this.lockRing.material.opacity = 0.3 + Math.sin(time * 5) * 0.2;
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // Rotate inner ring opposite direction
                        if (this.lockRing2) {
                            this.lockRing2.rotation.z -= dt * 3;
                            if (this.lockRing2.material) {
                                this.lockRing2.material.opacity = pulse;
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // Animate scan line sweeping
                        if (this.lockScanLine) {
                            this.lockScanLine.rotation.z += dt * 4;
                            if (this.lockScanLine.material) {
                                this.lockScanLine.material.opacity = 0.4 + Math.sin(time * 10) * 0.3;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                showLockOn(visible) {
                    if (this.lockOnGroup) {
                        this.lockOnGroup.visible = visible;
                    }
                }
                
                shootParachute() {
                    if (!this.parachuteActive || this.state !== 'falling') return false;
                    
                    this.parachuteHealth--;
                    
                    // Visual feedback - change color
                    const colors = [0xff6600, 0xff9933, 0xffcc66];
                    this.parachute.material.color.setHex(colors[Math.max(0, this.parachuteHealth)]);
                    
                    if (this.parachuteHealth <= 0) {
                        this.parachuteActive = false;
                        this.fallSpeed = AIRDROP_FAST_FALL_SPEED;
                        
                        // Parachute tears - make it deflate
                        this.parachute.scale.set(0.5, 0.2, 0.5);
                        this.parachute.material.opacity = 0.4;
                    }
                    
                    return true;
                }
                
                getBoundingBox() {
                    const pos = this.group.position;
                    // Include parachute hitbox when active
                    if (this.parachuteActive && this.state === 'falling') {
                        return {
                            min: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x - 3, pos.y + 2, pos.z - 3),
                            max: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x + 3, pos.y + 6, pos.z + 3),
                            isParachute: true
                        };
                    }
                    // Just crate hitbox
                    return {
                        min: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x - 1, pos.y - 0.75, pos.z - 1),
                        max: new THREE.Vector3(pos.x + 1, pos.y + 0.75, pos.z + 1),
                        isParachute: false
                    };
                }
                
                destroy() {
                    scene.remove(this.group);
                    // Also remove shadow
                    if (this.shadow) {
                        scene.remove(this.shadow);
                    }
                }
            }
