            function spawnHeadshotText(worldPos) {
                // Convert 3D position to screen coordinates
                const pos = worldPos.clone();
                pos.project(camera);
                
                const screenX = (pos.x * 0.5 + 0.5) * gameWorld.clientWidth;
                const screenY = (-pos.y * 0.5 + 0.5) * gameWorld.clientHeight;
                
                // Create floating text element
                const textEl = document.createElement('div');
                textEl.className = 'headshot-text';
                
                // Clean, compact headshot display - no score shown
                if (headshotCombo > 1) {
                    textEl.innerHTML = `HEADSHOT ×${headshotCombo}`;
                } else {
                    textEl.innerHTML = `HEADSHOT`;
                }
                
                textEl.style.left = screenX + 'px';
                textEl.style.top = screenY + 'px';
                
                gameWorld.appendChild(textEl);
                
                // Remove after animation completes
                setTimeout(() => {
                    textEl.remove();
                }, 900);
            }
            
            function updateBulletTime(dt) {
                if (bulletTimeActive) {
                    bulletTimeTimer -= dt * 3; // Timer runs at normal speed
                    
                    if (bulletTimeTimer <= 0) {
                        bulletTimeActive = false;
                        gameTimeScale = 1;
                        bulletTimeOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                    } else {
                        // Gradually restore time scale
                        const progress = 1 - (bulletTimeTimer / BULLET_TIME_DURATION);
                        if (progress > 0.6) {
                            gameTimeScale = 0.3 + (progress - 0.6) * 1.75; // Ease back to normal
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                // Update headshot combo timer
                if (headshotComboTimer > 0) {
                    headshotComboTimer -= dt;
                    if (headshotComboTimer <= 0) {
                        headshotCombo = 0;
                        headshotComboEl.classList.remove('active');
                    }
                }
            }

            // ==================== INPUT HANDLING ====================
            const isMobile = 'ontouchstart' in window || navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0;
            
            // Multi-touch tracking for unified controls
            // Each active touch is tracked independently
            const activeTouches = new Map(); // touchId -> { startX, startY, startTime, lastX, lastY, hasMoved }
            const TAP_THRESHOLD_DISTANCE = 15; // Max pixels to still count as a tap
            const TAP_THRESHOLD_TIME = 300; // Max ms to count as a tap
            
            if (isMobile) {
                // Hide old separate zones - we use unified touch on entire screen
                shootZone.style.display = 'none';
                joystickZone.style.display = 'none';
                instructions.textContent = 'Tap to shoot • Drag to aim';
            } else {
                instructions.textContent = 'Click to lock mouse • Move to aim • Click to shoot';
            }

            // Desktop controls
            canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (gameState === 'playing' && !pointerLocked && !isMobile) {
                    canvas.requestPointerLock();
                }
            });
            
            document.addEventListener('pointerlockchange', () => {
                pointerLocked = document.pointerLockElement === canvas;
            });
            
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                if (pointerLocked && gameState === 'playing') {
                    const sensitivity = 0.002;
                    const yawChange = -e.movementX * sensitivity;
                    const pitchChange = -e.movementY * sensitivity;
                    cameraYaw += yawChange;
                    cameraPitch += pitchChange;
                    cameraPitch = Math.max(minPitch, Math.min(maxPitch, cameraPitch));
                    // 只在攻击状态（idle）时限制摄像机转动范围
                    if (playerMovementState === 'idle') {
                        clampCameraYaw();
                    }
                    
                    // 记录摄像机移动速度（用于辅助瞄准判断）
                    cameraYawVelocity = yawChange;
                    cameraPitchVelocity = pitchChange;
                    if (Math.abs(yawChange) > 0.0001) {
                        lastCameraYawDirection = Math.sign(yawChange);
                        timeSinceLastCameraMove = 0;
                    }
                }
            });
            
            document.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                if (e.button === 0 && pointerLocked && gameState === 'playing') {
                    shoot();
                }
            });
            
            document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
                if (e.key === 'Escape' && pointerLocked) {
                    document.exitPointerLock();
                }
            });

            // Mobile controls - Unified touch system
            // Tap anywhere = shoot, Drag anywhere = rotate camera
            // Multi-touch supported: firing doesn't affect camera rotation
            
            gameWorld.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
                if (gameState !== 'playing' && !isWaveTransition) return;
                
                // Don't intercept UI element touches
                if (e.target.closest('.item-slot') || 
                    e.target.closest('.game-btn') || 
                    e.target.closest('#rank-display') ||
                    e.target.closest('#leaderboard-popup') ||
                    e.target.closest('#bestiary-modal')) {
                    return;
                }
                
                e.preventDefault();
                
                const now = Date.now();
                for (const touch of e.changedTouches) {
                    activeTouches.set(touch.identifier, {
                        startX: touch.clientX,
                        startY: touch.clientY,
                        startTime: now,
                        lastX: touch.clientX,
                        lastY: touch.clientY,
                        hasMoved: false
                    });
                }
            }, { passive: false });
            
            gameWorld.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
                if (gameState !== 'playing' && !isWaveTransition) return;
                
                // Don't intercept if touching UI elements
                if (e.target.closest('.item-slot') || 
                    e.target.closest('.game-btn') || 
                    e.target.closest('#rank-display') ||
                    e.target.closest('#leaderboard-popup') ||
                    e.target.closest('#bestiary-modal')) {
                    return;
                }
                
                e.preventDefault();
                
                const sensitivity = 0.006;
                
                for (const touch of e.changedTouches) {
                    const data = activeTouches.get(touch.identifier);
                    if (!data) continue;
                    
                    const dx = touch.clientX - data.lastX;
                    const dy = touch.clientY - data.lastY;
                    
                    // Check if this touch has moved enough to be considered a drag
                    const totalDx = touch.clientX - data.startX;
                    const totalDy = touch.clientY - data.startY;
                    const totalDistance = Math.sqrt(totalDx * totalDx + totalDy * totalDy);
                    
                    if (totalDistance > TAP_THRESHOLD_DISTANCE) {
                        data.hasMoved = true;
                    }
                    
                    // Apply camera rotation for dragging touches
                    if (data.hasMoved) {
                        const yawChange = -dx * sensitivity;
                        const pitchChange = -dy * sensitivity;
                        cameraYaw += yawChange;
                        cameraPitch += pitchChange;
                        cameraPitch = Math.max(minPitch, Math.min(maxPitch, cameraPitch));
                        // 只在攻击状态（idle）时限制摄像机转动范围
                        if (playerMovementState === 'idle') {
                            clampCameraYaw();
                        }
                        
                        // 记录摄像机移动速度（用于辅助瞄准判断）
                        cameraYawVelocity = yawChange;
                        cameraPitchVelocity = pitchChange;
                        if (Math.abs(yawChange) > 0.0001) {
                            lastCameraYawDirection = Math.sign(yawChange);
                            timeSinceLastCameraMove = 0;
                        }
                    }
                    
                    data.lastX = touch.clientX;
                    data.lastY = touch.clientY;
                }
            }, { passive: false });
            
            gameWorld.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
                // Don't intercept if touching UI elements
                if (e.target.closest('.item-slot') || 
                    e.target.closest('.game-btn') || 
                    e.target.closest('#rank-display') ||
                    e.target.closest('#leaderboard-popup') ||
                    e.target.closest('#bestiary-modal')) {
                    return;
                }
                
                const now = Date.now();
                
                for (const touch of e.changedTouches) {
                    const data = activeTouches.get(touch.identifier);
                    if (!data) continue;
                    
                    // Check if this was a tap (short time, minimal movement)
                    const duration = now - data.startTime;
                    
                    if (!data.hasMoved && duration < TAP_THRESHOLD_TIME) {
                        // This is a tap - fire!
                        if (gameState === 'playing' || isWaveTransition) {
                            shoot();
                        }
                    }
                    
                    activeTouches.delete(touch.identifier);
                }
            }, { passive: false });
            
            gameWorld.addEventListener('touchcancel', (e) => {
                for (const touch of e.changedTouches) {
                    activeTouches.delete(touch.identifier);
                }
            }, { passive: false });

            // Screen buttons
            const startBtn = document.getElementById('start-btn');
            const restartBtn = document.getElementById('restart-btn');
            
            startBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                if (gameState === 'menu') {
                    startGame();
                }
            });
            
            startBtn.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                if (gameState === 'menu') {
                    startGame();
                }
            });
            
            restartBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                restartGame();
            });
            
            restartBtn.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                restartGame();
            });
            
            // Bestiary button and modal handling
            const bestiaryBtn = document.getElementById('bestiary-btn');
            const bestiaryModal = document.getElementById('bestiary-modal');
            const bestiaryCloseBtn = document.getElementById('bestiary-close-btn');
            const bestiaryContent = document.getElementById('bestiary-content');
            const bestiaryBtnIcon = bestiaryBtn.querySelector('.btn-icon');
            
            // Zombie type definitions for bestiary (with Chinese names)
            const ZOMBIE_TYPES_INFO = [
                { id: 'normal', name: 'Normal Zombie', nameCN: '普通僵尸', iconClass: 'zombie-icon-normal' },
                { id: 'crawler', name: 'Crawler', nameCN: '爬行僵尸', iconClass: 'zombie-icon-crawler' },
                { id: 'helmet', name: 'Helmet Zombie', nameCN: '钢盔僵尸', iconClass: 'zombie-icon-helmet' },
                { id: 'runner', name: 'Runner', nameCN: '狂奔僵尸', iconClass: 'zombie-icon-runner' },
                { id: 'giant', name: 'Giant', nameCN: '巨型僵尸', iconClass: 'zombie-icon-giant' },
                { id: 'bat', name: 'Zombie Bat', nameCN: '僵尸蝙蝠', iconClass: 'zombie-icon-bat' },
                { id: 'dog', name: 'Zombie Dog', nameCN: '僵尸狗', iconClass: 'zombie-icon-dog' },
                { id: 'boneThrower', name: 'Bone Thrower', nameCN: '投骨僵尸', iconClass: 'zombie-icon-boneThrower' },
                { id: 'screamer', name: 'Screamer', nameCN: '尖叫僵尸', iconClass: 'zombie-icon-screamer' }
            ];
            
            // New zombie warning system
            const newZombieWarning = document.getElementById('new-zombie-warning');
            const newZombieList = document.getElementById('new-zombie-list');
            
            // Detect new zombie types for the next wave
            function getNewZombieTypesForWave(nextWave) {
                const spawnWaves = config.zombieSpawnWaves || { 
                    normal: 1, crawler: 2, helmet: 4, runner: 3, giant: 5, bat: 2, dog: 3, boneThrower: 3, screamer: 4 
                };
                
                const newTypes = [];
                
                // Check each zombie type
                ZOMBIE_TYPES_INFO.forEach(typeInfo => {
                    const unlockWave = spawnWaves[typeInfo.id] || 999;
                    // If this type unlocks exactly at nextWave (wasn't available before)
                    if (unlockWave === nextWave) {
                        newTypes.push(typeInfo);
                    }
                });
                
                return newTypes;
            }
            
            // Show new zombie warning popup
            function showNewZombieWarning(newTypes) {
                if (newTypes.length === 0) return;
                
                // Build the list of new zombie entries
                newZombieList.innerHTML = '';
                newTypes.forEach(typeInfo => {
                    const entry = document.createElement('div');
                    entry.className = 'new-zombie-entry';
                    entry.innerHTML = `
                        <span class="zombie-icon ${typeInfo.iconClass}"></span>
                        <span class="zombie-name">${typeInfo.name}</span>
                    `;
                    newZombieList.appendChild(entry);
                });
                
                // Show the warning
                newZombieWarning.classList.remove('hide');
                newZombieWarning.classList.add('show');
                
                // Auto-hide after 3 seconds
                setTimeout(() => {
                    hideNewZombieWarning();
                }, 3000);
            }
            
            // Hide new zombie warning popup
            function hideNewZombieWarning() {
                newZombieWarning.classList.remove('show');
                newZombieWarning.classList.add('hide');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    newZombieWarning.classList.remove('hide');
                }, 400);
            }
            
            // Bestiary button icon animation
            let bestiaryIconIndex = 0;
            let bestiaryIconInterval = null;
            
            function startBestiaryIconAnimation() {
                if (bestiaryIconInterval) return;
                bestiaryIconInterval = setInterval(() => {
                    bestiaryIconIndex = (bestiaryIconIndex + 1) % ZOMBIE_TYPES_INFO.length;
                    const typeInfo = ZOMBIE_TYPES_INFO[bestiaryIconIndex];
                    bestiaryBtnIcon.innerHTML = `<span class="zombie-icon ${typeInfo.iconClass}"></span>`;
                }, 500);
                // Initial icon
                bestiaryBtnIcon.innerHTML = `<span class="zombie-icon ${ZOMBIE_TYPES_INFO[0].iconClass}"></span>`;
            }
            
            function stopBestiaryIconAnimation() {
                if (bestiaryIconInterval) {
                    clearInterval(bestiaryIconInterval);
                    bestiaryIconInterval = null;
                }
            }
            
            // Generate bestiary content
            function renderBestiary() {
                bestiaryContent.innerHTML = '';
                
                ZOMBIE_TYPES_INFO.forEach(typeInfo => {
                    const kills = totalKillsByType[typeInfo.id] || 0;
                    const isUnlocked = kills > 0;
                    
                    const entry = document.createElement('div');
                    entry.className = `bestiary-entry${isUnlocked ? '' : ' locked'}`;
                    
                    // Build full model HTML with child elements for complex models
                    let modelHTML = '';
                    const lockedClass = isUnlocked ? '' : ' locked';
                    
                    switch(typeInfo.id) {
                        case 'normal':
                            modelHTML = `<div class="zombie-model-full zombie-model-normal${lockedClass}">
                                <div class="zombie-arms"></div>
                                <div class="zombie-legs"></div>
                            </div>`;
                            break;
                        case 'crawler':
                            modelHTML = `<div class="zombie-model-full zombie-model-crawler${lockedClass}"></div>`;
                            break;
                        case 'helmet':
                            modelHTML = `<div class="zombie-model-full zombie-model-helmet${lockedClass}">
                                <div class="zombie-body"></div>
                                <div class="zombie-legs"></div>
                            </div>`;
                            break;
                        case 'runner':
                            modelHTML = `<div class="zombie-model-full zombie-model-runner${lockedClass}">
                                <div class="zombie-legs"></div>
                            </div>`;
                            break;
                        case 'giant':
                            modelHTML = `<div class="zombie-model-full zombie-model-giant${lockedClass}">
                                <div class="zombie-legs"></div>
                            </div>`;
                            break;
                        case 'bat':
                            modelHTML = `<div class="zombie-model-full zombie-model-bat${lockedClass}"></div>`;
                            break;
                        case 'dog':
                            modelHTML = `<div class="zombie-model-full zombie-model-dog${lockedClass}">
                                <div class="dog-legs"></div>
                                <div class="dog-tail"></div>
                            </div>`;
                            break;
                        case 'boneThrower':
                            modelHTML = `<div class="zombie-model-full zombie-model-boneThrower${lockedClass}">
                                <div class="zombie-ribs"></div>
                                <div class="zombie-legs"></div>
                            </div>`;
                            break;
                        case 'screamer':
                            modelHTML = `<div class="zombie-model-full zombie-model-screamer${lockedClass}">
                                <div class="zombie-mouth"></div>
                                <div class="zombie-legs"></div>
                            </div>`;
                            break;
                        default:
                            modelHTML = `<div class="zombie-model-full zombie-model-normal${lockedClass}">
                                <div class="zombie-arms"></div>
                                <div class="zombie-legs"></div>
                            </div>`;
                    }
                    
                    entry.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="bestiary-portrait">
                            <span class="portrait-icon zombie-icon ${typeInfo.iconClass}"></span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="bestiary-model">
                            ${modelHTML}
                        </div>
                        <div class="bestiary-name">${isUnlocked ? typeInfo.name : '???'}</div>
                        <div class="bestiary-kills">
                            💀 <span>${kills}</span> kills
                        </div>
                        ${!isUnlocked ? '<div class="bestiary-stats">Kill to unlock</div>' : ''}
                    `;
                    
                    bestiaryContent.appendChild(entry);
                });
                
                // Add mystery entry at the end
                const mysteryEntry = document.createElement('div');
                mysteryEntry.className = 'bestiary-entry mystery';
                mysteryEntry.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="bestiary-portrait">
                        <span class="portrait-icon">?</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bestiary-model">
                        <span class="model-display">?</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bestiary-name">???</div>
                    <div class="bestiary-kills">
                        💀 <span>???</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bestiary-stats">Coming Soon...</div>
                `;
                bestiaryContent.appendChild(mysteryEntry);
            }
            
            // Open bestiary modal
            function openBestiary() {
                renderBestiary();
                bestiaryModal.classList.add('show');
            }
            
            // Close bestiary modal
            function closeBestiary() {
                bestiaryModal.classList.remove('show');
            }
            
            bestiaryBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                openBestiary();
            });
            
            bestiaryBtn.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                openBestiary();
            });
            
            bestiaryCloseBtn.addEventListener('click', closeBestiary);
            bestiaryCloseBtn.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                closeBestiary();
            });

            // ==================== SHOOTING ====================
            // Auto-aim assist settings (射击时的辅助)
            const AUTO_AIM_ANGLE_THRESHOLD_BASE = 0.15; // Max angle (radians) to consider for assist
            const AUTO_AIM_ANGLE_THRESHOLD_BOOSTED = 0.75; // 5x boost after being attacked
            const AUTO_AIM_STRENGTH = 0.4; // How much to adjust (0-1, higher = stronger snap)
            let autoAimBoostTimer = 0; // Timer for boosted auto-aim after being attacked
            const AUTO_AIM_BOOST_DURATION = 3; // Seconds of boosted auto-aim after attack
            
            // Continuous auto-aim assist settings (持续辅助瞄准)
            let lastCameraYaw = 0; // Track camera movement direction
            let lastCameraPitch = 0;
            let cameraYawVelocity = 0; // Camera rotation velocity
            let cameraPitchVelocity = 0;
            let lastCameraYawDirection = 0;
            let timeSinceLastCameraMove = 100;
            
            function getAutoAimTarget() {
                // Find the zombie closest to crosshair center
                let bestTarget = null;
                // Use boosted threshold if recently attacked
                const currentThreshold = autoAimBoostTimer > 0 ? AUTO_AIM_ANGLE_THRESHOLD_BOOSTED : AUTO_AIM_ANGLE_THRESHOLD_BASE;
                let bestAngle = currentThreshold;
                
                const cameraDir = new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, -1);
                cameraDir.applyQuaternion(camera.quaternion);
                
                for (const zombie of zombies) {
                    if (!zombie.alive || zombie.dying) continue;
                    
                    // Get direction to zombie
                    const zombiePos = zombie.getWorldPosition();
                    // Aim for center mass (body) or head
                    zombiePos.y += zombie.isCrawler ? 0.3 : 1.2;
                    
                    const toZombie = zombiePos.clone().sub(camera.position).normalize();
                    
                    // Calculate angle between camera direction and zombie direction
                    const angle = Math.acos(Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, cameraDir.dot(toZombie))));
                    
                    if (angle < bestAngle) {
                        bestAngle = angle;
                        bestTarget = { pos: zombiePos, type: 'zombie' };
                    }
                }
                
                // Also check bats
                for (const bat of zombieBats) {
                    if (!bat.alive || bat.dying) continue;
                    
                    const batPos = bat.getWorldPosition();
                    const toBat = batPos.clone().sub(camera.position).normalize();
                    const angle = Math.acos(Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, cameraDir.dot(toBat))));
                    
                    if (angle < bestAngle) {
                        bestAngle = angle;
                        bestTarget = { pos: batPos, type: 'bat' };
                    }
                }
                
                // Also check dogs
                for (const dog of zombieDogs) {
                    if (!dog.alive || dog.dying) continue;
                    
                    const dogPos = dog.getWorldPosition();
                    dogPos.y += 0.3; // Aim at body center
                    const toDog = dogPos.clone().sub(camera.position).normalize();
                    const angle = Math.acos(Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, cameraDir.dot(toDog))));
                    
                    if (angle < bestAngle) {
                        bestAngle = angle;
                        bestTarget = { pos: dogPos, type: 'dog' };
                    }
                }
                
                return bestTarget;
            }
            
            // 持续辅助瞄准 - 当瞄准器接近目标时自动偏向
            function getContinuousAutoAimTarget(angleThresholdDegrees) {
                // 将角度阈值从度转换为弧度
                const angleThreshold = angleThresholdDegrees * (Math.PI / 180);
                
                let bestTarget = null;
                let bestAngle = angleThreshold;
                let bestHorizontalAngle = angleThreshold; // 只考虑水平夹角
                
                const cameraDir = new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, -1);
                cameraDir.applyQuaternion(camera.quaternion);
                
                // 获取摄像机水平方向（忽略垂直分量）
                const cameraDirHorizontal = new THREE.Vector3(cameraDir.x, 0, cameraDir.z).normalize();
                
                for (const zombie of zombies) {
                    if (!zombie.alive || zombie.dying) continue;
                    
                    const zombiePos = zombie.getWorldPosition();
                    zombiePos.y += zombie.isCrawler ? 0.3 : (zombie.isGiant ? 3.5 : 1.2);
                    
                    // 计算到目标的方向
                    const toTarget = zombiePos.clone().sub(camera.position);
                    const toTargetHorizontal = new THREE.Vector3(toTarget.x, 0, toTarget.z).normalize();
                    
                    // 计算水平夹角
                    const horizontalAngle = Math.acos(Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, cameraDirHorizontal.dot(toTargetHorizontal))));
                    
                    if (horizontalAngle < bestHorizontalAngle) {
                        bestHorizontalAngle = horizontalAngle;
                        bestTarget = { pos: zombiePos, horizontalAngle: horizontalAngle };
                    }
                }
                
                // 检查蝙蝠
                for (const bat of zombieBats) {
                    if (!bat.alive || bat.dying) continue;
                    
                    const batPos = bat.getWorldPosition();
                    const toTarget = batPos.clone().sub(camera.position);
                    const toTargetHorizontal = new THREE.Vector3(toTarget.x, 0, toTarget.z).normalize();
                    const cameraDirH = new THREE.Vector3(cameraDir.x, 0, cameraDir.z).normalize();
                    const horizontalAngle = Math.acos(Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, cameraDirH.dot(toTargetHorizontal))));
                    
                    if (horizontalAngle < bestHorizontalAngle) {
                        bestHorizontalAngle = horizontalAngle;
                        bestTarget = { pos: batPos, horizontalAngle: horizontalAngle };
                    }
                }
                
                // 检查狗
                for (const dog of zombieDogs) {
                    if (!dog.alive || dog.dying) continue;
                    
                    const dogPos = dog.getWorldPosition();
                    dogPos.y += 0.3;
                    const toTarget = dogPos.clone().sub(camera.position);
                    const toTargetHorizontal = new THREE.Vector3(toTarget.x, 0, toTarget.z).normalize();
                    const cameraDirH = new THREE.Vector3(cameraDir.x, 0, cameraDir.z).normalize();
                    const horizontalAngle = Math.acos(Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, cameraDirH.dot(toTargetHorizontal))));
                    
                    if (horizontalAngle < bestHorizontalAngle) {
                        bestHorizontalAngle = horizontalAngle;
                        bestTarget = { pos: dogPos, horizontalAngle: horizontalAngle };
                    }
                }
                
                return bestTarget;
            }
            
            // 应用持续辅助瞄准
            function applyContinuousAutoAim(dt) {
                if (playerMovementState !== 'idle') return;
                if (gameState !== 'playing' && !isWaveTransition) return;
                
                // 从配置获取参数
                const autoAimConfig = config.autoAim || {};
                const angleThreshold = autoAimConfig.angleThreshold || 10; // 默认10度
                const aimStrength = autoAimConfig.strength || 0.3; // 默认0.3
                
                if (aimStrength <= 0 || angleThreshold <= 0) return;
                
                const target = getContinuousAutoAimTarget(angleThreshold);
                if (!target) return;
                
                const targetPos = target.pos;
                
                // 计算目标yaw
                const dx = targetPos.x - camera.position.x;
                const dz = targetPos.z - camera.position.z;
                const targetYaw = Math.atan2(-dx, -dz);
                
                // 计算yaw差值（处理环绕）
                let yawDiff = targetYaw - cameraYaw;
                while (yawDiff > Math.PI) yawDiff -= Math.PI * 2;
                while (yawDiff < -Math.PI) yawDiff += Math.PI * 2;
                
                // 检查是否与玩家移动方向相反
                let isMovingOpposite = false;
                if (Math.abs(cameraYawVelocity) > 0.001) {
                    if ((yawDiff > 0 && cameraYawVelocity < 0) || (yawDiff < 0 && cameraYawVelocity > 0)) {
                        isMovingOpposite = true;
                    }
                } else if (timeSinceLastCameraMove < 0.3) {
                    if ((yawDiff > 0 && lastCameraYawDirection < 0) || (yawDiff < 0 && lastCameraYawDirection > 0)) {
                        isMovingOpposite = true;
                    }
                }
                
                if (isMovingOpposite) {
                    return; // 不矫正，玩家在向相反方向移动
                }
                
                // 调整辅助强度，使拉枪更迅速且明显
                // aimStrength 默认值为1到10左右
                const speedMultiplier = aimStrength * dt * 1.5; 
                
                // 平滑靠近目标，避免在极近距离时抖动
                const moveAmount = yawDiff * Math.min(1, speedMultiplier);
                
                cameraYaw += moveAmount;
            }
            
            function applyAutoAimAdjust() {
                const target = getAutoAimTarget();
                if (!target) return;
                
                // Get target position
                const targetPos = target.pos;
                
                // Calculate desired yaw and pitch
                const dx = targetPos.x - camera.position.x;
                const dy = targetPos.y - camera.position.y;
                const dz = targetPos.z - camera.position.z;
                const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz);
                
                const targetYaw = Math.atan2(-dx, -dz);
                const targetPitch = Math.atan2(dy, dist);
                
                // Calculate yaw difference (handle wrap-around)
                let yawDiff = targetYaw - cameraYaw;
                while (yawDiff > Math.PI) yawDiff -= Math.PI * 2;
                while (yawDiff < -Math.PI) yawDiff += Math.PI * 2;
                
                // 检查是否与玩家移动方向相反
                let isMovingOpposite = false;
                if (Math.abs(cameraYawVelocity) > 0.001) {
                    if ((yawDiff > 0 && cameraYawVelocity < 0) || (yawDiff < 0 && cameraYawVelocity > 0)) {
                        isMovingOpposite = true;
                    }
                } else if (timeSinceLastCameraMove < 0.3) {
                    if ((yawDiff > 0 && lastCameraYawDirection < 0) || (yawDiff < 0 && lastCameraYawDirection > 0)) {
                        isMovingOpposite = true;
                    }
                }
                
                if (isMovingOpposite) {
                    return; // 不矫正
                }
                
                const pitchDiff = targetPitch - cameraPitch;
                
                // Apply smooth adjustment
                cameraYaw += yawDiff * AUTO_AIM_STRENGTH;
                cameraPitch += pitchDiff * AUTO_AIM_STRENGTH;
                
                // Clamp pitch
                cameraPitch = Math.max(minPitch, Math.min(maxPitch, cameraPitch));
            }
            
            function shoot() {
                // Don't shoot while running to/from airdrop
                if (playerMovementState !== 'idle') return;
                
                // If locked on to supply crate, trigger collection instead of shooting
                if (currentLockedAirdrop && currentLockedAirdrop.state === 'landed') {
                    startCollection();
                    return;
                }
                // Play gunfire sound
                playGunfire();
                
                // Show 3D muzzle flash
                muzzleFlashGroup.visible = true;
                muzzleFlashTimer = MUZZLE_FLASH_DURATION;
                
                // Randomize flash appearance for variety
                const scale = 0.8 + Math.random() * 0.4;
                muzzleFlashGroup.scale.setScalar(scale);
                muzzleFlashGroup.rotation.z = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                
                // Reset flash opacity
                flashMaterials.forEach((mat, i) => {
                    mat.opacity = i === 0 ? 1 : (i === 1 ? 0.8 : 0.9);
                });
                
                // Animate gun recoil
                gunRecoil = 0.08;
                barrelRotation += Math.PI / 6; // Rotate barrel group
                
                // Spawn shell casing
                spawnShellCasing();
                
                // Raycast from camera center
                const raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster();
                raycaster.setFromCamera(new THREE.Vector2(0, 0), camera);
                
                let hit = false;
                let closestZombie = null;
                let closestDist = Infinity;
                let isHeadshot = false;
                
                for (const zombie of zombies) {
                    if (!zombie.alive || zombie.dying) continue;
                    
                    // Check head first
                    const headBox = zombie.getHeadBox();
                    const headHit = rayIntersectsBox(raycaster.ray, headBox);
                    
                    if (headHit && headHit < closestDist) {
                        closestDist = headHit;
                        closestZombie = zombie;
                        isHeadshot = true;
                    }
                    
                    // Check body
                    const bodyBox = zombie.getBoundingBox();
                    const bodyHit = rayIntersectsBox(raycaster.ray, bodyBox);
                    
                    if (bodyHit && bodyHit < closestDist) {
                        closestDist = bodyHit;
                        closestZombie = zombie;
                        isHeadshot = false;
                    }
                }
                
                if (closestZombie) {
                    const result = closestZombie.takeDamage(isHeadshot);
                    showHitMarker(result.headshot);
                    
                    // Spawn green blood effect at hit location
                    const hitPos = closestZombie.getWorldPosition();
                    
                    // Calculate proper hit height based on zombie type
                    if (closestZombie.isGiant) {
                        // Giant zombie - scale factor is 6.4/1.95 ≈ 3.28
                        const giantScale = 6.4 / 1.95;
                        if (isHeadshot) {
                            hitPos.y += closestZombie.headYPos || (6.49); // Head position for giant
                        } else {
                            hitPos.y += 1.1 * giantScale; // Body center for giant (~3.6)
                        }
                    } else if (closestZombie.isCrawler) {
                        hitPos.y += isHeadshot ? 0.4 : 0.25;
                    } else {
                        // Normal/runner zombie
                        hitPos.y += isHeadshot ? 1.6 : 1.0;
                    }
                    
                    if (isHeadshot) {
                        if (result.helmetHit) {
                            // Helmet was hit - play metallic sound and show notification
                            playHelmetHitSound();
                            showItemNotification('🪖 HELMET HIT!');
                            // Still spawn some blood
                            spawnBloodEffect(hitPos.clone());
                        } else {
                            // MORE blood for headshots!
                            spawnBloodEffect(hitPos.clone());
                            spawnBloodEffect(hitPos.clone());
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // Spawn blood - more particles for giants
                    spawnBloodEffect(hitPos);
                    if (closestZombie.isGiant) {
                        // Extra blood for giant zombies - they're bigger!
                        spawnBloodEffect(hitPos.clone());
                        spawnBloodEffect(hitPos.clone());
                    }
                    
                    if (result.killed) {
                        const points = result.headshot ? 150 : 100;
                        score += points;
                        zombiesKilledThisWave++;
                        // Track kill by zombie type
                        trackZombieKill(closestZombie);
                        // Mark helmet zombies that lost helmet before death
                        if (!closestZombie.hasHelmet && closestZombie.helmetMesh === null) {
                            closestZombie.hadHelmet = true;
                        }
                        if (result.headshot) {
                            headshotsThisWave++;
                            // Trigger enhanced headshot feedback!
                            triggerHeadshotFeedback(hitPos);
                        }
                        updateUI();
                    }
                }
                
                // Check for bat hits
                let closestBat = null;
                let closestBatDist = closestDist; // Only hit bat if closer than zombie
                
                for (const bat of zombieBats) {
                    if (!bat.alive || bat.dying) continue;
                    
                    const batBox = bat.getBoundingBox();
                    const batHit = rayIntersectsBox(raycaster.ray, batBox);
                    
                    if (batHit && batHit < closestBatDist) {
                        closestBatDist = batHit;
                        closestBat = bat;
                    }
                }
                
                if (closestBat) {
                    const result = closestBat.takeDamage();
                    showHitMarker(false);
                    
                    // Spawn blood effect
                    const hitPos = closestBat.getWorldPosition();
                    spawnBloodEffect(hitPos);
                    
                    if (result.killed) {
                        score += 50; // Bats give less points (easier to kill)
                        zombiesKilledThisWave++;
                        trackBatKill(); // Track bat kill
                        updateUI();
                    }
                }
                
                // Check for dog hits
                let closestDog = null;
                let closestDogDist = closestBatDist;
                
                for (const dog of zombieDogs) {
                    if (!dog.alive || dog.dying) continue;
                    
                    const dogBox = dog.getBoundingBox();
                    const dogHit = rayIntersectsBox(raycaster.ray, dogBox);
                    
                    if (dogHit && dogHit < closestDogDist) {
                        closestDogDist = dogHit;
                        closestDog = dog;
                    }
                }
                
                if (closestDog) {
                    const result = closestDog.takeDamage();
                    showHitMarker(false);
                    
                    const hitPos = closestDog.getWorldPosition();
                    spawnBloodEffect(hitPos);
                    
                    if (result.killed) {
                        score += 50; // Dogs give same points as bats
                        zombiesKilledThisWave++;
                        trackDogKill();
                        updateUI();
                    }
                }
                
                // Check for airdrop hit
                for (const airdrop of activeAirdrops) {
                    if (airdrop.state === 'falling') {
                        const airdropBox = airdrop.getBoundingBox();
                        const airdropHit = rayIntersectsBox(raycaster.ray, airdropBox);
                        
                        if (airdropHit && airdropBox.isParachute) {
                            // Hit the parachute!
                            airdrop.shootParachute();
                            showHitMarker(false);
                            score += 25;
                            updateUI();
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                // Apply auto-aim adjustment after shot - ONLY if we missed
                // If already aimed at an enemy (hit), no need for correction
                if (!closestZombie) {
                    applyAutoAimAdjust();
                }
                
                // Muzzle flash effect (quick camera shake)
                cameraPitch += 0.02;
                setTimeout(() => cameraPitch -= 0.02, 50);
            }
            
            // Shell casing animation
            function spawnShellCasing() {
                const shell = document.createElement('div');
                shell.className = 'shell-casing';
                
                // Random starting position near gun
                const startX = gameWorld.clientWidth / 2 + 30 + Math.random() * 20;
                const startY = gameWorld.clientHeight - 150;
                
                shell.style.left = startX + 'px';
                shell.style.top = startY + 'px';
                
                gameWorld.appendChild(shell);
                
                // Animate the shell
                const velocityX = 3 + Math.random() * 4;
                const velocityY = -14 - Math.random() * 6;
                const rotationSpeed = 10 + Math.random() * 10;
                let x = startX;
                let y = startY;
                let vx = velocityX;
                let vy = velocityY;
                let rotation = 0;
                let gravity = 0.5;
                
                function animateShell() {
                    vx *= 0.99;
                    vy += gravity;
                    x += vx;
                    y += vy;
                    rotation += rotationSpeed;
                    
                    shell.style.left = x + 'px';
                    shell.style.top = y + 'px';
                    shell.style.transform = `rotate(${rotation}deg)`;
                    
                    if (y < gameWorld.clientHeight + 50) {
                        requestAnimationFrame(animateShell);
                    } else {
                        shell.remove();
                    }
                }
                
                requestAnimationFrame(animateShell);
            }
            
            function rayIntersectsBox(ray, box) {
                const invDir = new THREE.Vector3(1/ray.direction.x, 1/ray.direction.y, 1/ray.direction.z);
                
                let tmin = (box.min.x - ray.origin.x) * invDir.x;
                let tmax = (box.max.x - ray.origin.x) * invDir.x;
                if (tmin > tmax) [tmin, tmax] = [tmax, tmin];
                
                let tymin = (box.min.y - ray.origin.y) * invDir.y;
                let tymax = (box.max.y - ray.origin.y) * invDir.y;
                if (tymin > tymax) [tymin, tymax] = [tymax, tymin];
                
                if (tmin > tymax || tymin > tmax) return null;
                if (tymin > tmin) tmin = tymin;
                if (tymax < tmax) tmax = tymax;
                
                let tzmin = (box.min.z - ray.origin.z) * invDir.z;
                let tzmax = (box.max.z - ray.origin.z) * invDir.z;
                if (tzmin > tzmax) [tzmin, tzmax] = [tzmax, tzmin];
                
                if (tmin > tzmax || tzmin > tmax) return null;
                if (tzmin > tmin) tmin = tzmin;
                
                return tmin > 0 ? tmin : null;
            }

            // ==================== WAVE MANAGEMENT ====================
            function startGame() {
                startScreen.classList.remove('active');
                gameState = 'countdown';
                score = 0;
                currentWave = 1;
                maxHealth = config.gameplay.playerHealth || 100;
                playerHealth = maxHealth;
                cameraYaw = 0;
                cameraPitch = 0;
                isWaveTransition = false;
                
                // Start background music
                if (audioContext && audioContext.state === 'suspended') {
                    audioContext.resume();
                }
                if (bgMusicGain) {
                    bgMusicGain.gain.value = 0.3;
                }
                startBackgroundMusic();
                startBreathingSound();
                startHeartbeatSound();
                
                // Clear any existing zombies
                zombies.forEach(z => z.destroy());
                zombies.length = 0;
                
                updateUI();
                
                // Countdown
                let countdown = 3;
                showWaveAnnouncement(countdown.toString());
                playCountdownBeep(); // Play beep for first countdown number
                
                const countdownInterval = setInterval(() => {
                    countdown--;
                    if (countdown > 0) {
                        showWaveAnnouncement(countdown.toString());
                        playCountdownBeep(); // Play beep for each countdown number
                    } else {
                        clearInterval(countdownInterval);
                        startWave(1);
                    }
                }, 1000);
            }
            
            function startWave(waveNum) {
                gameState = 'playing';
                currentWave = waveNum;
                zombiesKilledThisWave = 0;
                headshotsThisWave = 0;
                waveStartScore = score;
                isWaveTransition = false;
                
                // Reset kill tracking for new wave
                resetWaveKillTracking();
                
                // Update sky color based on wave
                setupLighting(waveNum);
                updateSky(waveNum);
                
                // Calculate zombie count: previous wave + configurable random increase
                const minIncrease = config.gameplay.zombieIncreaseMin || 0;
                const maxIncrease = config.gameplay.zombieIncreaseMax || 2;
                const extraZombies = minIncrease + Math.floor(Math.random() * (maxIncrease - minIncrease + 1));
                zombiesToSpawn = lastWaveZombieCount + extraZombies;
                lastWaveZombieCount = zombiesToSpawn; // Update for next wave
                
                zombiesRemaining = zombiesToSpawn;
                spawnTimer = 0;
                
                // Play tense wave start sound
                playWaveStart();
                
                // Temporarily lower background music volume so the start sound is clear
                if (bgMusicGain && audioContext) {
                    bgMusicGain.gain.cancelScheduledValues(audioContext.currentTime);
                    bgMusicGain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.1, audioContext.currentTime);
                    bgMusicGain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.3, audioContext.currentTime + 3);
                }
                
                showWaveAnnouncement(`WAVE ${waveNum}`);
                updateUI();
            }
            
            async function endWave() {
                // Play victory sound
                playWaveVictory();
                
                // Calculate wave stats (still calculate for scoring, just don't display banner)
                const waveScore = score - waveStartScore;
                const healthPercent = Math.floor((playerHealth / maxHealth) * 100);
                const survivalBonus = Math.floor(healthPercent * currentWave * 2); // Bonus based on remaining health
                score += survivalBonus;
                
                // Check for new zombie types in next wave and show warning
                const nextWave = currentWave + 1;
                const newZombieTypes = getNewZombieTypesForWave(nextWave);
                if (newZombieTypes.length > 0) {
                    // Show warning after a short delay
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        showNewZombieWarning(newZombieTypes);
                    }, 500);
                }
                
                isWaveTransition = true;
                isWaitingForAirdrop = true;
                
                // Upload score to leaderboard at end of each wave
                try {
                    const response = await lib.addPlayerScoreToLeaderboard(score, 10);
                    if (response.success && response.userRank) {
                        updateRankDisplay(response.userRank);
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    lib.log(`Failed to upload wave score: ${error.message}`);
                }
                
                // Play radio operator message after a short delay, then spawn airdrop
                setTimeout(() => {
                    playRadioSupplies();
                }, 1500);
                
                // Spawn airdrop
                setTimeout(() => {
                    spawnAirdrop();
                    isWaitingForAirdrop = false;
                    waveCountdown = config.gameplay.waveIntervalTime || 10; // Start countdown immediately
                    updateUI();
                }, 2500);
            }
            
            function updateWaveTransition(dt) {
                if (!isWaveTransition) return;
                
                if (isWaitingForAirdrop) {
                    waveCountdownDisplay.classList.remove('active');
                    return;
                }
                
                waveCountdown -= dt;
                updateUI();
                
                if (waveCountdown <= 0) {
                    isWaveTransition = false;
                    currentWave++;
                    startWave(currentWave);
                }
            }
            
            function restartGame() {

                updateInventoryUI();

                playerRank = null;

                rankDisplay.style.display = 'block';

                resetWaveKillTracking();

                overdriveActive = false;

                freezeActive = false;

                overdriveOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                shieldOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                freezeOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                overdriveTimerEl.classList.remove('active');
                shieldTimerEl.classList.remove('active');
                freezeTimerEl.classList.remove('active');
                crosshair.classList.remove('overdrive');
                
                // Stop current music and restart
                stopBackgroundMusic();
                stopBreathingSound();
                stopHeartbeatSound();
