            async function gameOver() {
                gameState = 'gameOver';
                document.getElementById('final-score').innerHTML = `Final Score: ${score}<br>Waves Survived: ${currentWave - 1}`;
                gameOverScreen.classList.add('active');
                showDamageFlash();
                
                // Start bestiary button icon animation
                startBestiaryIconAnimation();
                
                const lowHealthOverlay = document.getElementById('low-health-overlay');
                if (lowHealthOverlay) {
                    lowHealthOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                }
                
                // Fade out background music
                fadeOutMusic(1.5);
                stopBreathingSound();
                stopHeartbeatSound();
                
                if (!isMobile && pointerLocked) {
                    document.exitPointerLock();
                }
                
                // Upload score to leaderboard and update rank display
                try {
                    const response = await lib.addPlayerScoreToLeaderboard(score, 10);
                    if (response.success && response.userRank) {
                        updateRankDisplay(response.userRank);
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    lib.log(`Failed to upload game over score: ${error.message}`);
                }
                
                // Start rank progression animation
                setTimeout(() => {
                    startRankProgression(score);
                }, 500);
                
                // Upload final score to leaderboard (no display on game over screen)
                try {
                    await lib.addPlayerScoreToLeaderboard(score, 10);
                } catch (error) {
                    lib.log(`Failed to upload final score: ${error.message}`);
                }
            }
            
            // Rank progression animation - Slot machine style
            function startRankProgression(finalScore) {
                const ranks = config.ranks || [
                    { name: '列兵', icon: '🎖️', minScore: 0 }
                ];
                
                const rankContainer = document.getElementById('rank-progression-container');
                const rankIcon = document.getElementById('rank-icon');
                const rankName = document.getElementById('rank-name');
                const rankThreshold = document.getElementById('rank-score-threshold');
                const rankProgressBar = document.getElementById('rank-progress-bar');
                const rankCelebration = document.getElementById('rank-celebration');
                
                // Reset state
                rankContainer.classList.remove('final-rank');
                rankProgressBar.style.width = '0%';
                
                // Find target rank index based on score
                let targetRankIndex = 0;
                for (let i = ranks.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                    if (finalScore >= ranks[i].minScore) {
                        targetRankIndex = i;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                
                // Slot machine parameters
                const EXTRA_SPINS = 2; // How many times to cycle through all ranks before stopping
                const totalSteps = ranks.length * EXTRA_SPINS + targetRankIndex + 1;
                const MIN_INTERVAL = 40; // Fastest speed (ms)
                const MAX_INTERVAL = 300; // Slowest speed (ms)
                const ACCEL_PHASE = 0.2; // First 20% - accelerating
                const DECEL_PHASE = 0.3; // Last 30% - decelerating
                
                let currentStep = 0;
                let animationTimer = null;
                
                // Update display for current rank (slot machine style - just swap instantly)
                function updateRankDisplay(index) {
                    const rank = ranks[index % ranks.length];
                    rankIcon.textContent = rank.icon;
                    rankName.textContent = rank.name;
                    rankThreshold.textContent = `${rank.minScore.toLocaleString()} pts`;
                    
                    // Quick pulse animation for slot effect
                    rankName.classList.remove('climbing');
                    void rankName.offsetWidth;
                    rankName.classList.add('climbing');
                }
                
                // Calculate interval based on current progress (slot machine easing)
                function getInterval(step, total) {
                    const progress = step / total;
                    
                    if (progress < ACCEL_PHASE) {
                        // Accelerating phase - start slow, get faster
                        const t = progress / ACCEL_PHASE;
                        const easeOut = 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 2);
                        return MAX_INTERVAL - (MAX_INTERVAL - MIN_INTERVAL) * easeOut;
                    } else if (progress > (1 - DECEL_PHASE)) {
                        // Decelerating phase - slow down as approaching target
                        const t = (progress - (1 - DECEL_PHASE)) / DECEL_PHASE;
                        const easeIn = t * t * t; // Cubic ease in for dramatic slowdown
                        return MIN_INTERVAL + (MAX_INTERVAL - MIN_INTERVAL) * easeIn;
                    } else {
                        // Full speed in the middle
                        return MIN_INTERVAL;
                    }
                }
                
                // Spawn celebration particles
                function spawnCelebrationParticles() {
                    const particles = ['⭐', '🌟', '✨', '💫', '🎖️', '🏆'];
                    for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
                        const particle = document.createElement('div');
                        particle.className = 'rank-particle';
                        particle.textContent = particles[Math.floor(Math.random() * particles.length)];
                        particle.style.left = (20 + Math.random() * 60) + '%';
                        particle.style.top = (30 + Math.random() * 40) + '%';
                        particle.style.animationDelay = (Math.random() * 0.3) + 's';
                        particle.style.animationDuration = (1 + Math.random() * 0.5) + 's';
                        rankContainer.appendChild(particle);
                        
                        // Remove after animation
                        setTimeout(() => particle.remove(), 2000);
                    }
                }
                
                // Show final rank with celebration
                function showFinalRank() {
                    updateRankDisplay(targetRankIndex);
                    
                    // Celebration effect
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        rankContainer.classList.add('final-rank');
                        rankCelebration.classList.remove('active');
                        void rankCelebration.offsetWidth;
                        rankCelebration.classList.add('active');
                        spawnCelebrationParticles();
                        playWaveVictory();
                        
                        // Show final progress (how far into this rank)
                        const nextRankScore = ranks[targetRankIndex + 1]?.minScore || ranks[targetRankIndex].minScore * 2;
                        const currentRankScore = ranks[targetRankIndex].minScore;
                        const progress = Math.min(100, ((finalScore - currentRankScore) / (nextRankScore - currentRankScore)) * 100);
                        rankProgressBar.style.width = progress + '%';
                    }, 200);
                }
                
                // Start the slot machine animation
                updateRankDisplay(0);
                
                if (targetRankIndex === 0 && ranks.length <= 1) {
                    // Only one rank exists, just show it
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        rankContainer.classList.add('final-rank');
                        rankCelebration.classList.add('active');
                        spawnCelebrationParticles();
                        playWaveVictory();
                    }, 500);
                    return;
                }
                
                // Slot machine spin animation
                function spinStep() {
                    currentStep++;
                    
                    // Calculate which rank to show (cycling through all ranks)
                    const displayIndex = currentStep % ranks.length;
                    updateRankDisplay(displayIndex);
                    
                    // Play tick sound for slot machine feel (use countdown beep)
                    if (currentStep > totalSteps * 0.7) {
                        // Only play sound in the last 30% when slowing down
                        playCountdownBeep();
                    }
                    
                    if (currentStep >= totalSteps) {
                        // Animation complete - show final rank
                        showFinalRank();
                    } else {
                        // Schedule next step with dynamic interval
                        const interval = getInterval(currentStep, totalSteps);
                        animationTimer = setTimeout(spinStep, interval);
                    }
                }
                
                // Start spinning after a short delay
                setTimeout(() => {
                    animationTimer = setTimeout(spinStep, MAX_INTERVAL);
                }, 300);
            }
            


            // ==================== SPAWN SYSTEM ====================
            function updateSpawning(dt) {
                if (gameState !== 'playing' || zombiesToSpawn <= 0) return;
                
                // Check max enemies on screen limit
                const maxEnemies = config.gameplay.maxEnemiesOnScreen || 30;
                const currentEnemies = zombies.filter(z => z.alive && !z.dying).length + 
                                       zombieBats.filter(b => b.alive && !b.dying).length +
                                       zombieDogs.filter(d => d.alive && !d.dying).length;
                
                // Don't spawn if at limit
                if (currentEnemies >= maxEnemies) return;
                
                // Progressive spawn rate - faster in later waves for more intensity
                // Base: 1.8 seconds between spawns, reduced by wave number
                const baseSpawnRate = 1.8;
                const spawnRate = Math.max(0.4, baseSpawnRate - (currentWave - 1) * 0.15);
                
                spawnTimer += dt;
                if (spawnTimer >= spawnRate) {
                    spawnTimer = 0;
                    spawnZombie();
                    zombiesToSpawn--;
                }
            }
            
            function spawnZombie() {
                // Calculate spawn angle range based on wave
                // Wave 1 starts with initial angle, increases each wave up to max
                const initialAngle = config.gameplay.spawnAngleInitial || 30;
                const angleIncrement = config.gameplay.spawnAngleIncrement || 30;
                const maxAngle = config.gameplay.spawnAngleMax || 360;
                
                // Calculate current wave's spawn angle range
                const waveAngleRange = Math.min(
                    initialAngle + (currentWave - 1) * angleIncrement,
                    maxAngle
                );
                
                // Convert to radians (half range for +/- from center)
                const halfRangeRadians = (waveAngleRange / 2) * (Math.PI / 180);
                
                // Forward direction is -Z (angle = -π/2 in our coordinate system)
                const forwardAngle = -Math.PI / 2;
                
                // Random angle within the allowed range, centered on forward
                const spawnAngle = forwardAngle + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2 * halfRangeRadians;
                
                // Check which zombie types are available for current wave
                const spawnWaves = config.zombieSpawnWaves || { normal: 1, crawler: 2, helmet: 4, runner: 3, giant: 5, bat: 2, dog: 3, boneThrower: 3, screamer: 4 };
                const crawlerUnlocked = currentWave >= (spawnWaves.crawler || 2);
                const helmetUnlocked = currentWave >= (spawnWaves.helmet || 4);
                const runnerUnlocked = currentWave >= (spawnWaves.runner || 3);
                const giantUnlocked = currentWave >= (spawnWaves.giant || 5);
                const batUnlocked = currentWave >= (spawnWaves.bat || 2);
                const dogUnlockWave = (spawnWaves.dog ?? spawnWaves.bat ?? 2);
                const dogUnlocked = currentWave >= dogUnlockWave;
                const boneThrowerUnlocked = currentWave >= (spawnWaves.boneThrower || 3);
                const screamerUnlocked = currentWave >= (spawnWaves.screamer || 4);
                
                // Use config chances
                const crawlerChance = config.gameplay.crawlerChance || 0.2;
                const helmetChance = config.gameplay.helmetZombieChance || 0.15;
                const runnerChance = config.gameplay.runnerZombieChance || 0.15;
                const giantChance = config.gameplay.giantZombieChance || 0.1;
                const batChance = config.gameplay.batChance || 0.15;
                const dogChance = config.gameplay.dogChance ?? config.gameplay.batChance ?? 0.15;
                const boneThrowerChance = config.gameplay.boneThrowerChance || 0.12;
                const screamerChance = config.gameplay.screamerChance || 0.1;
                
                // Determine zombie type (priority: bat > giant > screamer > boneThrower > runner > helmet > crawler > normal)
                // Bats spawn as a GROUP, so we check first and spawn multiple
                let isCrawler = false;
                let hasHelmet = false;
                let isRunner = false;
                let isGiant = false;
                let isBoneThrower = false;
                let isScreamer = false;
                
                const roll = Math.random();
                let threshold = 0;
                
                // Check for bat swarm spawn first (only if no active bat group)
                if (batUnlocked && canSpawnBatGroup() && roll < (threshold += batChance)) {
                    // Spawn a group of bats instead of a single zombie
                    const batsSpawned = spawnBatGroup();
                    if (batsSpawned > 0) {
                        // Bats count as multiple enemies for wave completion tracking
                        // But we only decrease zombiesToSpawn by 1 (the spawn slot)
                        return;
                    }
                    // If no bats spawned (group still active), fall through to spawn zombie instead
                }
                
                // Check for dog pack spawn
                if (dogUnlocked && canSpawnDogPack() && roll < (threshold += dogChance)) {
                    const dogsSpawned = spawnDogPack();
                    if (dogsSpawned > 0) {
                        return;
                    }
                }
                
                if (giantUnlocked && roll < (threshold += giantChance)) {
                    isGiant = true;
                } else if (screamerUnlocked && roll < (threshold += screamerChance)) {
                    isScreamer = true;
                } else if (boneThrowerUnlocked && roll < (threshold += boneThrowerChance)) {
                    isBoneThrower = true;
                } else if (runnerUnlocked && roll < (threshold += runnerChance)) {
                    isRunner = true;
                } else if (helmetUnlocked && roll < (threshold += helmetChance)) {
                    hasHelmet = true;
                } else if (crawlerUnlocked && roll < (threshold += crawlerChance)) {
                    isCrawler = true;
                }
                
                const zombie = new Zombie(spawnAngle, isCrawler, hasHelmet, isRunner, isGiant, isBoneThrower, isScreamer);
                
                // Apply freeze effect if active
                if (freezeActive) {
                    zombie.originalSpeed = zombie.speed;
                    zombie.speed *= 0.3;
                    if (!frozenZombieMats) {
                        frozenZombieMats = createFrozenMaterials();
                    }
                    applyFrozenEffect(zombie, true);
                }
                
                zombies.push(zombie);
            }

            // ==================== MAIN GAME LOOP ====================
            function gameLoop(timestamp) {
                const rawDt = Math.min((timestamp - lastTime) / 1000, 0.11);
                lastTime = timestamp;
                
                // Update bullet time effect (runs at real time)
                updateBulletTime(rawDt);
                
                // Apply time scale for bullet time effect
                const dt = rawDt * gameTimeScale;
                
                // 应用持续辅助瞄准
                applyContinuousAutoAim(dt);
                
                // Auto-fire system - fire automatically when PRECISELY aimed at enemy
                // Burst fire: shoots 2-3 bullets per trigger
                if (autoFireEnabled && playerMovementState === 'idle' && (gameState === 'playing' || isWaveTransition)) {
                    // Handle ongoing burst fire
                    if (autoFireBurstRemaining > 0) {
                        autoFireBurstDelay -= dt;
                        if (autoFireBurstDelay <= 0) {
                            shoot();
                            autoFireBurstRemaining--;
                            if (autoFireBurstRemaining > 0) {
                                // Short delay between burst shots - configurable
                                const burstDelay = config.gameplay.autoFireBurstDelay || 0.06;
                                autoFireBurstDelay = burstDelay + Math.random() * 0.02;
                            } else {
                                // Burst complete, set cooldown before next burst
                                const autoFireRate = config.gameplay.autoFireRate || 0.12;
                                autoFireCooldown = overdriveActive ? autoFireRate * 0.5 : autoFireRate;
                            }
                        }
                    } else {
                        // Check for new burst trigger
                        autoFireCooldown -= dt;
                        if (autoFireCooldown <= 0) {
                            // Use precise raycast to check if crosshair is on an enemy
                            const raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster();
                            raycaster.setFromCamera(new THREE.Vector2(0, 0), camera);
                            
                            let targetFound = false;
                            let closestDist = Infinity;
                            
                            // Check zombies
                            for (const zombie of zombies) {
                                if (!zombie.alive || zombie.dying) continue;
                                
                                // Check head
                                const headBox = zombie.getHeadBox();
                                const headHit = rayIntersectsBox(raycaster.ray, headBox);
                                if (headHit && headHit < closestDist) {
                                    closestDist = headHit;
                                    targetFound = true;
                                }
                                
                                // Check body
                                const bodyBox = zombie.getBoundingBox();
                                const bodyHit = rayIntersectsBox(raycaster.ray, bodyBox);
                                if (bodyHit && bodyHit < closestDist) {
                                    closestDist = bodyHit;
                                    targetFound = true;
                                }
                            }
                            
                            // Check bats
                            for (const bat of zombieBats) {
                                if (!bat.alive || bat.dying) continue;
                                const batBox = bat.getBoundingBox();
                                const batHit = rayIntersectsBox(raycaster.ray, batBox);
                                if (batHit && batHit < closestDist) {
                                    closestDist = batHit;
                                    targetFound = true;
                                }
                            }
                            
                            // Check dogs
                            for (const dog of zombieDogs) {
                                if (!dog.alive || dog.dying) continue;
                                const dogBox = dog.getBoundingBox();
                                const dogHit = rayIntersectsBox(raycaster.ray, dogBox);
                                if (dogHit && dogHit < closestDist) {
                                    closestDist = dogHit;
                                    targetFound = true;
                                }
                            }
                            
                            // Only shoot if crosshair is precisely on target
                            if (targetFound) {
                                // Fire first shot immediately
                                shoot();
                                // Start burst: 2-3 shots total (1 already fired, so 1-2 more)
                                autoFireBurstRemaining = 1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2); // 1 or 2 more shots
                                autoFireBurstDelay = 0.06 + Math.random() * 0.02; // Short delay before next burst shot
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                // 衰减摄像机速度记录（如果没有输入则逐渐归零）
                cameraYawVelocity *= 0.9;
                cameraPitchVelocity *= 0.9;
                if (Math.abs(cameraYawVelocity) < 0.0001) cameraYawVelocity = 0;
                if (Math.abs(cameraPitchVelocity) < 0.0001) cameraPitchVelocity = 0;
                
                timeSinceLastCameraMove += dt;
                
                // Update camera rotation with shake
                camera.rotation.order = 'YXZ';
                camera.rotation.y = cameraYaw + cameraShakeX;
                camera.rotation.x = cameraPitch + cameraShakeY;
                
                // Animate gun recoil
                if (gunRecoil > 0) {
                    turretGroup.position.z = gunRecoil;
                    gunRecoil *= 0.8;
                    if (gunRecoil < 0.001) {
                        gunRecoil = 0;
                        turretGroup.position.z = 0;
                    }
                }
                
                // Idle sway animation when camera is stationary (realistic gun holding)
                if (playerMovementState === 'idle' && gunRecoil === 0) {
                    idleSwayTime += dt * IDLE_SWAY_SPEED;
                    
                    // Breathing motion - slow vertical bob
                    const breathY = Math.sin(idleSwayTime * 1.2) * IDLE_SWAY_Y;
                    // Subtle horizontal drift
                    const swayX = Math.sin(idleSwayTime * 0.8) * Math.cos(idleSwayTime * 0.5) * IDLE_SWAY_X;
                    // Tiny rotation for natural feel
                    const swayRotZ = Math.sin(idleSwayTime * 0.7) * IDLE_SWAY_ROTATION;
                    const swayRotX = Math.cos(idleSwayTime * 0.9) * IDLE_SWAY_ROTATION * 0.5;
                    
                    turretGroup.position.x = swayX;
                    turretGroup.position.y = breathY;
                    turretGroup.rotation.z = swayRotZ;
                    turretGroup.rotation.x = swayRotX;
                } else if (playerMovementState !== 'idle') {
                    // Reset sway when moving
                    turretGroup.position.x = 0;
                    turretGroup.position.y = 0;
                    turretGroup.rotation.z = 0;
                    turretGroup.rotation.x = 0;
                }
                
                // Smooth barrel rotation
                barrelGroup.rotation.z += (barrelRotation - barrelGroup.rotation.z) * 0.2;
                
                // Update muzzle flash
                if (muzzleFlashTimer > 0) {
                    muzzleFlashTimer -= dt;
                    const progress = 1 - (muzzleFlashTimer / MUZZLE_FLASH_DURATION);
                    // Fade out flash
                    flashMaterials.forEach((mat, i) => {
                        const baseOpacity = i === 0 ? 1 : (i === 1 ? 0.8 : 0.9);
                        mat.opacity = baseOpacity * (1 - progress);
                    });
                    // Scale down slightly
                    const scaleDown = 1 - progress * 0.3;
                    muzzleFlashGroup.scale.multiplyScalar(scaleDown > 0.7 ? 1 : scaleDown);
                    
                    if (muzzleFlashTimer <= 0) {
                        muzzleFlashGroup.visible = false;
                    }
                }
                
                if (mode === 'play') {
                    if (gameState === 'playing' || isWaveTransition) {
                        // Update wave transition countdown
                        updateWaveTransition(dt);
                        
                        // Update spawning
                        if (gameState === 'playing') {
                            updateSpawning(dt);
                        }
                        
                        // Update airdrops
                        for (let i = activeAirdrops.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                            activeAirdrops[i].update(dt);
                        }
                        
                        // Update plane flyover shadow effect
                        updatePlaneFlyover(dt);
                        
                        // Update collect button visibility - no longer needed, using crosshair lock-on
                        // Button is always hidden now
                        
                        // Update lock-on target effect
                        updateLockOnTarget();
                        
                        // Update player movement (running to/from airdrop)
                        updatePlayerMovement(dt);
                        
                        // Update item effects
                        updateItemEffects(dt);
                        
                        // Update screen shake (for airstrike)
                        updateScreenShake(dt);
                        
                        // Update zombies
                        let aliveCount = 0;
                        for (let i = zombies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                            const zombie = zombies[i];
                            zombie.update(dt);
                            
                            if (zombie.alive) {
                                if (!zombie.dying) {
                                    aliveCount++;
                                    
                                    // Check if zombie can attack player
                                    if (zombie.canAttackPlayer()) {
                                        let damage = zombie.attackPlayer();
                                        if (damage > 0) {
                                            // Apply shield reduction
                                            if (shieldActive) {
                                                damage = Math.floor(damage * 0.3);
                                            }
                                            playerHealth -= damage;
                                            showDamageFlash();
                                            // Flash the attacking zombie red
                                            zombie.flashAttack();
                                            // Boost auto-aim after being attacked
                                            autoAimBoostTimer = AUTO_AIM_BOOST_DURATION;
                                            updateUI();
                                            
                                            if (playerHealth <= 0) {
                                                gameOver();
                                                break;
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            } else {
                                zombie.destroy();
                                zombies.splice(i, 1);
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // Update blood particles
                        for (let i = bloodParticles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                            if (!bloodParticles[i].update(dt)) {
                                bloodParticles[i].destroy();
                                bloodParticles.splice(i, 1);
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // Update bone projectiles
                        for (let i = boneProjectiles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                            const result = boneProjectiles[i].update(dt);
                            if (result && result.hit) {
                                // Bone hit player
                                let damage = result.damage;
                                if (shieldActive) damage = Math.floor(damage * 0.3);
                                playerHealth -= damage;
                                showDamageFlash();
                                showItemNotification('🦴 BONE HIT!');
                                autoAimBoostTimer = AUTO_AIM_BOOST_DURATION;
                                updateUI();
                                if (playerHealth <= 0) {
                                    gameOver();
                                }
                            }
                            if (!boneProjectiles[i].alive) {
                                boneProjectiles[i].destroy();
                                boneProjectiles.splice(i, 1);
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // Update sonic waves
                        for (let i = sonicWaves.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                            const result = sonicWaves[i].update(dt);
                            if (result && result.hit) {
                                // Sonic wave hit player - disrupts vision and boosts zombie speed
                                // Apply screen blur/distortion effect
                                applyScreenDistortion();
                                showItemNotification('📢 SCREAMER ATTACK! ZOMBIES BOOSTED!');
                                autoAimBoostTimer = AUTO_AIM_BOOST_DURATION;
                                
                                // Activate screamer speed boost for all zombies
                                activateScreamerSpeedBoost();
                                
                                updateUI();
                            }
                            if (!sonicWaves[i].alive) {
                                sonicWaves[i].destroy();
                                sonicWaves.splice(i, 1);
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // Update zombie bats
                        let aliveBatCount = 0;
                        for (let i = zombieBats.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                            const bat = zombieBats[i];
                            bat.update(dt);
                            
                            if (bat.alive) {
                                if (!bat.dying) {
                                    aliveBatCount++;
                                    
                                    // Check if bat can attack player
                                    if (bat.canAttackPlayer()) {
                                        let damage = bat.attackPlayer();
                                        if (damage > 0) {
                                            // Apply shield reduction
                                            if (shieldActive) {
                                                damage = Math.floor(damage * 0.3);
                                            }
                                            playerHealth -= damage;
                                            showDamageFlash();
                                            autoAimBoostTimer = AUTO_AIM_BOOST_DURATION;
                                            updateUI();
                                            
                                            if (playerHealth <= 0) {
                                                gameOver();
                                                break;
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            } else {
                                bat.destroy();
                                zombieBats.splice(i, 1);
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // Update zombie dogs
                        let aliveDogCount = 0;
                        for (let i = zombieDogs.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                            const dog = zombieDogs[i];
                            dog.update(dt);
                            
                            if (dog.alive) {
                                if (!dog.dying) {
                                    aliveDogCount++;
                                    
                                    // Check if dog can attack player
                                    if (dog.canAttackPlayer()) {
                                        let damage = dog.attackPlayer();
                                        if (damage > 0) {
                                            if (shieldActive) {
                                                damage = Math.floor(damage * 0.3);
                                            }
                                            playerHealth -= damage;
                                            showDamageFlash();
                                            autoAimBoostTimer = AUTO_AIM_BOOST_DURATION;
                                            updateUI();
                                            
                                            if (playerHealth <= 0) {
                                                gameOver();
                                                break;
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            } else {
                                dog.destroy();
                                zombieDogs.splice(i, 1);
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // Check wave completion - include bats and dogs
                        if (zombiesToSpawn <= 0 && aliveCount === 0 && aliveBatCount === 0 && aliveDogCount === 0 && gameState === 'playing' && !isWaveTransition) {
                            endWave();
                        }
                        
                        // Dynamic breathing sound - ONLY when running
                        if (breathingGain) {
                            let breathingVol = 0;
                            if (playerMovementState === 'running_to_airdrop' || playerMovementState === 'running_back') {
                                breathingVol = 0.5; // Only play when actively running
                            }
                            breathingGain.gain.value += (breathingVol - breathingGain.gain.value) * 0.1;
                        }
                        
                        // Heartbeat sound and low health visual effect - ONLY when health is low (below 45%)
                        if (heartbeatGain) {
                            const healthPercent = Math.max(0, playerHealth / maxHealth);
                            let heartbeatVol = 0;
                            const lowHealthOverlay = document.getElementById('low-health-overlay');
                            if (healthPercent <= 0.45 && playerHealth > 0) {
                                // Heartbeat gets louder as health drops - use much higher base volume 
                                // to ensure low frequency sound is clearly audible on all devices
                                heartbeatVol = 2.5 + (0.45 - healthPercent) * 6.0;
                                // Show low health visual effect
                                if (lowHealthOverlay && !lowHealthOverlay.classList.contains('active')) {
                                    lowHealthOverlay.classList.add('active');
                                }
                            } else {
                                // Hide low health visual effect when health recovers
                                if (lowHealthOverlay && lowHealthOverlay.classList.contains('active')) {
                                    lowHealthOverlay.classList.remove('active');
                                }
                            }
                            heartbeatGain.gain.value += (heartbeatVol - heartbeatGain.gain.value) * 0.2;
                        }
                        
                        // Update auto-aim boost timer
                        if (autoAimBoostTimer > 0) {
                            autoAimBoostTimer -= dt;
                        }
                    }
                } else {
                    // Edit mode - just render environment
                }
                
                // Render
                renderer.render(scene, camera);
                
                requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
            }

            // ==================== EDIT MODE SETUP ====================
            if (mode === 'edit') {
                // Hide game UI in edit mode
                document.querySelector('.ui-overlay').style.display = 'none';
                startScreen.classList.remove('active');
                
                // Add some sample zombies for preview from all directions
                for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
                    const angle = (i / 8) * Math.PI * 2;
                    const isCrawler = i % 3 === 0; // Every 3rd zombie is a crawler
                    const zombie = new Zombie(angle, isCrawler);
                    // Move them closer for preview
                    zombie.group.position.x *= 0.5;
                    zombie.group.position.z *= 0.5;
                    zombies.push(zombie);
                }
                
                // Free camera look in edit mode
                let isDragging = false;
                let lastMouseX = 0;
                let lastMouseY = 0;
                
                canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                    isDragging = true;
                    lastMouseX = e.clientX;
                    lastMouseY = e.clientY;
                });
                
                canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                    if (isDragging) {
                        const dx = e.clientX - lastMouseX;
                        const dy = e.clientY - lastMouseY;
                        cameraYaw -= dx * 0.005;
                        cameraPitch -= dy * 0.005;
                        cameraPitch = Math.max(minPitch, Math.min(maxPitch, cameraPitch));
                        lastMouseX = e.clientX;
                        lastMouseY = e.clientY;
                    }
                });
                
                canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => isDragging = false);
                canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => isDragging = false);
                
                // Touch support for edit mode
                canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
                    isDragging = true;
                    lastMouseX = e.touches[0].clientX;
                    lastMouseY = e.touches[0].clientY;
                });
                
                canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
                    if (isDragging) {
                        const dx = e.touches[0].clientX - lastMouseX;
                        const dy = e.touches[0].clientY - lastMouseY;
                        cameraYaw -= dx * 0.005;
                        cameraPitch -= dy * 0.005;
                        cameraPitch = Math.max(minPitch, Math.min(maxPitch, cameraPitch));
                        lastMouseX = e.touches[0].clientX;
                        lastMouseY = e.touches[0].clientY;
                    }
                });
                
                canvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => isDragging = false);
                
                // Hide turret in edit mode
                turretGroup.visible = false;
                
                // Camera position presets for observing the terrain
                const cameraPresets = [
                    { name: 'Player View', pos: { x: 0, y: 15, z: 0 }, yaw: 0, pitch: -0.4 },
                    { name: 'Top Down', pos: { x: 0, y: 80, z: 0 }, yaw: 0, pitch: -1.5 },
                    { name: 'Side View', pos: { x: 100, y: 30, z: 0 }, yaw: -Math.PI/2, pitch: -0.2 },
                    { name: 'Zombie View', pos: { x: 0, y: 0, z: 90 }, yaw: Math.PI, pitch: 0.2 },
                    { name: 'Diagonal', pos: { x: 60, y: 50, z: 60 }, yaw: -Math.PI/4, pitch: -0.5 },
                    { name: 'Low Angle', pos: { x: 40, y: 5, z: 40 }, yaw: -Math.PI/4, pitch: 0.15 }
                ];
                
                let currentPreset = 0;
                
                // Create camera control panel
                const cameraPanel = document.createElement('div');
                cameraPanel.style.cssText = `
                    position: absolute;
                    top: 16px;
                    left: 16px;
                    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
                    border-radius: 12px;
                    padding: 12px;
                    z-index: 100;
                    display: flex;
                    flex-direction: column;
                    gap: 8px;
                    font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
                `;
                
                const panelTitle = document.createElement('div');
                panelTitle.textContent = '📷 Camera Position';
                panelTitle.style.cssText = `
                    color: #fff;
                    font-size: 16px;
                    font-weight: bold;
                    margin-bottom: 4px;
                    text-align: center;
                `;
                cameraPanel.appendChild(panelTitle);
                
                cameraPresets.forEach((preset, index) => {
                    const btn = document.createElement('button');
                    btn.textContent = preset.name;
                    btn.style.cssText = `
                        padding: 10px 16px;
                        font-size: 14px;
                        font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
                        color: #fff;
                        background: ${index === 0 ? '#e74c3c' : '#444'};
                        border: none;
                        border-radius: 8px;
                        cursor: pointer;
                        transition: background 0.2s;
                        min-width: 120px;
                    `;
                    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        // Update button styles
                        cameraPanel.querySelectorAll('button').forEach((b, i) => {
                            b.style.background = i === index ? '#e74c3c' : '#444';
                        });
                        
                        // Animate camera to new position
                        const target = preset;
                        const startPos = { x: camera.position.x, y: camera.position.y, z: camera.position.z };
                        const startYaw = cameraYaw;
                        const startPitch = cameraPitch;
                        const duration = 500;
                        const startTime = performance.now();
                        
                        function animateCamera(time) {
                            const elapsed = time - startTime;
                            const t = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
                            const ease = t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : 1 - Math.pow(-2 * t + 2, 2) / 2;
                            
                            camera.position.x = startPos.x + (target.pos.x - startPos.x) * ease;
                            camera.position.y = startPos.y + (target.pos.y - startPos.y) * ease;
                            camera.position.z = startPos.z + (target.pos.z - startPos.z) * ease;
                            cameraYaw = startYaw + (target.yaw - startYaw) * ease;
                            cameraPitch = startPitch + (target.pitch - startPitch) * ease;
                            
                            if (t < 1) {
                                requestAnimationFrame(animateCamera);
                            }
                        }
                        requestAnimationFrame(animateCamera);
                        currentPreset = index;
                    });
                    btn.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                        if (currentPreset !== index) btn.style.background = '#666';
                    });
                    btn.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                        btn.style.background = currentPreset === index ? '#e74c3c' : '#444';
                    });
                    cameraPanel.appendChild(btn);
                });
                
                // Add hint text
                const hint = document.createElement('div');
                hint.textContent = 'Drag to rotate view';
                hint.style.cssText = `
                    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
                    font-size: 12px;
                    text-align: center;
                    margin-top: 4px;
                `;
                cameraPanel.appendChild(hint);
                
                gameWorld.appendChild(cameraPanel);
            }

            // Start game loop
            lastTime = performance.now();
            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
            
            // Initialize UI
            updateUI();
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
game_design_document:
## Core Game Loop and Mechanics

**Zombie Beach Assault** is a fixed-position 3D shooter where players defend a beachhead position against waves of zombies emerging from the ocean and advancing across the sand.

### Moment-to-Moment Gameplay
- Player stands at a fixed defensive position on the beach
- Zombies spawn from the water's edge and slowly advance toward the player
- Player aims and shoots zombies before they reach the defensive line
- Must manage ammunition and reload strategically during lulls in combat
- Between waves, player can place simple defensive traps (barbed wire, mines)

### Progression and Engagement
- **Wave System**: Zombies come in increasingly difficult waves
  - Early waves: Few slow zombies, easy to manage
  - Later waves: More zombies, faster movement, some tougher variants
  - Brief respite between waves for reloading and trap placement
- **Score System**: Points awarded for kills, headshots give bonus points
- **Resource Management**: Limited ammo per magazine, must reload tactically
- **Trap Deployment**: Earn trap tokens by surviving waves, place them strategically

### Win/Lose Conditions
- **Lose**: Any zombie reaches the player's defensive position
- **Win**: Survive as many waves as possible (endless mode)
- **Goal**: Achieve high score and survive maximum waves

### What Makes It Compelling
- **Tension**: Managing ammo while zombies approach creates constant pressure
- **Skill Expression**: Aiming for headshots, timing reloads, trap placement strategy
- **Escalation**: Each wave increases difficulty, testing player improvement
- **Replayability**: High score chasing, trying different trap strategies

## Starting Scope

The first iteration will focus on core shooting mechanics and basic wave progression:

**Must Have (First Iteration):**
- Fixed 3D first-person perspective on beach
- Basic zombie AI: spawn from water, walk toward player
- Shooting mechanics: mouse/touch aim, click/tap to shoot
- Ammo system: limited magazine (30 rounds), manual reload
- Wave system: 5 waves with increasing zombie count
- Simple health system: zombies take 2-3 body shots or 1 headshot
- Basic score tracking
- Game over when zombie reaches player
- Simple beach environment (sand, water, sky)
- One zombie type (standard walker)

**Future Iterations:**
- Trap placement system (barbed wire, mines)
- Multiple zombie variants (fast runners, tough brutes)
- Weapon upgrades between waves
- More complex environment (bunkers, obstacles)
- Sound effects and music
- Particle effects (blood, muzzle flash)
- More sophisticated scoring (combo multipliers, accuracy bonuses)

## Game Perspective

**3D First-Person Shooter**
- Player views the beach from a fixed defensive position
- Camera can rotate horizontally (look left/right) and vertically (look up/down)
- No player movement - fixed position defense
- Zombies approach from the water toward the camera
- Beach stretches from water's edge (far) to player position (near)

## Game World and Level Design

### Environment Layout
```
[PLAYER POSITION] ← You are here (fixed)
        ↑
    [SAND BEACH]
        ↑
   [WATER'S EDGE]
        ↑
     [OCEAN] ← Zombies spawn here
```

### Spatial Design
- **Player Position**: Fixed point on the beach, elevated slightly (on a bunker or defensive position)
- **Beach Zone**: 50-80 meters of sandy beach between player and water
  - Width: ~100 meters (zombies can approach from left, center, right)
  - Relatively flat terrain with subtle variations
- **Water's Edge**: Where zombies emerge and begin their approach
- **Ocean**: Visual backdrop, zombies spawn just offshore

### Visual Elements
- Sandy beach texture with footprints and disturbance marks
- Gentle waves at water's edge
- Sky with atmospheric lighting (overcast, tense mood)
- Distant horizon with fog/mist for atmosphere
- Simple environmental props: scattered debris, rocks, maybe a damaged boat

### Zombie Spawn System
- Zombies spawn at random positions along the water's edge
- Spawn points distributed across the beach width
- Wave 1: 5 zombies, spawn one at a time
- Wave 2: 8 zombies, spawn in pairs
- Wave 3: 12 zombies, spawn in groups of 3
- Wave 4: 15 zombies, continuous spawning
- Wave 5: 20 zombies, rapid spawning

### Distance and Timing
- Zombies take approximately 15-20 seconds to cross the beach at base speed
- Player has clear sightlines across the entire beach
- Effective shooting range: entire beach (no damage falloff for simplicity)

## Edit Mode Design

Players can customize these aspects in Edit mode:

### Gameplay Properties
- **Zombie Speed**: Adjust base movement speed (0.5x to 2x)
- **Zombie Health**: Adjust hits to kill (1-5 body shots)
- **Magazine Size**: Adjust ammo capacity (15-50 rounds)
- **Reload Time**: Adjust reload duration (1-4 seconds)
- **Wave Difficulty Scaling**: Adjust how quickly waves get harder (0.5x to 2x)

### Visual Properties
- **Time of Day**: Dawn, Day, Dusk, Night (affects lighting and mood)
- **Weather**: Clear, Foggy, Stormy (affects visibility and atmosphere)
- **Beach Color**: Sand tone variations (golden, grey, dark)
- **Water Color**: Ocean color variations (blue, grey, murky green)

### Constraints
- Zombie speed: minimum 0.5x (too slow becomes boring), maximum 2x (too fast becomes impossible)
- Magazine size: minimum 15 (must be playable), maximum 50 (prevents trivializing reload mechanic)
- Wave scaling: minimum 0.5x, maximum 2x (keeps progression balanced)
- All visual changes are cosmetic only, don't affect gameplay difficulty

## Control Design

**3D First-Person Shooter Controls**

### Desktop Controls
- **Mouse Movement**: Look around (aim) - pointer lock enabled during gameplay
- **Left Mouse Button**: Shoot
- **R Key**: Reload
- **ESC**: Release pointer lock / Pause menu
- **Space**: Start wave (when between waves)

### Mobile Controls
- **Right Joystick**: Look around (aim and camera control)
  - Appears on right side of screen when touched
  - Controls both horizontal and vertical camera rotation
  - Sensitivity tuned for smooth aiming
- **Tap Left Side**: Shoot (anywhere on left half of screen)
- **Reload Button**: Fixed button in bottom-left corner (96x96px minimum)
- **Start Wave Button**: Appears center-bottom between waves

### Implementation Details
- **Pointer Lock**: Enabled on desktop during active gameplay, released during menus/game over
- **Touch Tracking**: Right joystick tracks touch ID to prevent interference with shoot taps
- **Crosshair**: Fixed center-screen reticle for aiming reference
- **Input Buffering**: Clear all inputs on window blur, game over, or pause
- **Sensitivity**: Mouse and joystick sensitivity tuned for precise zombie headshots

### Control Flow
1. Game starts with "Tap to Begin" prompt
2. First wave countdown (3-2-1)
3. Zombies spawn, player aims and shoots
4. Between waves: "Wave Complete" screen with "Start Next Wave" button
5. Game over: "Game Over" screen with final score and "Restart" button

## Art Style and Visual Theme

### Overall Style
**Low-Poly 3D with Dark Atmosphere**
- Simple geometric shapes for characters and environment
- Flat or gradient shading (minimal lighting complexity)
- Dark, moody color palette emphasizing tension
- Clear silhouettes for easy target identification

### Color Palette
- **Beach**: Desaturated sandy browns and greys
- **Ocean**: Dark blue-grey, murky and threatening
- **Sky**: Overcast grey with subtle gradients
- **Zombies**: Pale grey-green skin, dark clothing
- **UI**: High contrast white/red for visibility

### Visual Scale
- **Zombies**: Approximately 1.8 meters tall, humanoid proportions
- **Beach**: Expansive, emphasizing distance and approaching threat
- **Crosshair**: Simple cross or dot, 20-30px, white with dark outline

### Rendering Approach
- **Environment**: Three.js 3D rendering
  - Simple plane for beach (textured)
  - Plane for ocean with subtle animation
  - Skybox or gradient background
- **Zombies**: Low-poly 3D models (simple humanoid shapes)
  - Basic walk animation (can be simple position interpolation)
  - Ragdoll or simple fall animation on death
- **UI Elements**: HTML/CSS overlay
  - Ammo counter (bottom-right)
  - Wave indicator (top-center)
  - Score (top-right)
  - Crosshair (center, CSS positioned)

### Asset vs Code Rendering
- **Generate Assets**: Zombie character model texture, UI icons (reload, ammo)
- **Code Rendering**: Beach terrain, ocean, sky, particle effects (muzzle flash, blood splatter), UI elements

game_metadata.title: 【ZOMBIE】 LAST HILL
game_metadata.description: Defend the beachhead against endless zombie waves in this intense 3D shooter where every bullet counts!
